summary: Debate which language features earn a place in an AI-written, extreme-performance language core, with null hypothesis CUT

verdicts.optimizerRole: Per-instance, generics add nothing: D001 attests monomorphization yields runtime behavior identical to hand-written concrete code, so the optimizer sees the same machine-code endpoint either way — the prosecution is granted this fully. The feature's real optimizer role is structural: (1) cross-instantiation identity, which enables cross-unit deduplication (D004 context; rustc share-generics is a named round-1 follow-up) and which textual near-duplicate copies destroy the moment any drift or checked-divergence hatch exists; (2) deferral of the specialize/share decision, keeping open the D005 bounded-sharing hybrid and the F009 Swift-SIL fourth model (IR-visible generic structure) that round-1 explicitly held open pending measurement — source-level pre-expansion forecloses that axis irreversibly, with no compiler knob to un-expand; (3) demand-driven instantiation (D001/D005/D010), which throttles the over-specialization compile-time/cache pressure documented in D009's negative scope; and (4) delivery of the concrete-type endpoint that J001/J002 show every high-performance runtime converges on, through a deterministic channel with zero guard/deopt/invalidation machinery. In the minimal kept form (frontend monomorphization only), the round-1 decisive open question — whether shared/erased bodies can discharge F003 noalias/alias.scope obligations — does not enter the shipped core: every instantiation discharges F003 per-instance exactly as concrete code does. That question attaches only to the sharing option, which stays gated behind the check round-1 already ordered.
verdicts.verificationRole: This is the decisive axis, and it is where the alternative collapses. Both parties agree N specializations must be verifiable as instantiations of one declared intent — the alternative's own CHECK concedes drift is the expected failure mode of a fallible writer at scale. But any check adequate to that job IS parametric generics: it needs a template sub-language with type parameters, template well-typedness checked once against declared bounds (otherwise errors surface per-copy post-expansion, defeating machine-readable diagnostics), and a computable instantiation relation copy == template[T]. If the checker can compute template[T] to compare, the compiler can emit template[T] directly; the expander is a strict subset of the checker (substitution without tree-equality). Generation-by-construction is therefore strictly stronger than check-after-generation: there is no window where divergent copies exist, and no checker whose acceptance bugs silently ship semantically wrong programs. The prosecution's trust-path argument fails on inspection — a checker bug that admits a divergent copy is not 'detected-late drift'; it is an undetected wrong program, equivalent in running-program severity to a miscompile. Kept generics also give check-once/instantiate-many verification: a template checked against bounds is a universally quantified proof over all instantiations, and F003-class discharge obligations established once transfer by substitution soundness, whereas per-copy re-verification scales with the instantiation closure and any tractability weakening of the check reopens the drift surface the charter forbids.
verdicts.aiWriterConsiderations: All AI-writer behavioral claims on both sides are EMPIRICAL-UNTESTED — the corpus contains zero AI-codegen evidence. That said, the admissible cost directions are forced by construction and favor keep: (1) token/context mass scales with the transitive instantiation closure under written-out copies versus O(1) in instantiation count for a template — generated, stored, and re-read on every edit; (2) template edits under the alternative trigger regeneration cascades across every downstream module, each rewrite a fresh hallucination opportunity, with a stale-copy window until the build-gating check closes it; (3) deciding which copies must exist is a whole-program call-graph fixpoint (generic-calls-generic at caller parameters) that compilers perform internally on demand (D001/D005/D010) — the alternative shifts it onto the writer or external tooling; (4) one template-level defect fans out as N per-copy diagnostics unless tooling re-aggregates by template identity — machinery generics gets for free. Verbosity being admissible cuts FOR the minimal kept form: instantiation arguments can be fully explicit, deleting the inference/solving subsystem the prosecution rightly fears, at pure token cost the charter accepts. The one open writer-side risk on the keep side: whether AI writers handle template abstraction (binding, bounds, explicit instantiation) with lower error rates than near-duplicate emission — untested in both directions, and the experiment is named in follow-ups.
whatMustBeTrue: The kept core is minimal: monomorphization-only parametric generics, expansion always compiler-side, explicit instantiation arguments (no global inference or bound solving in the trust path), polymorphic recursion and higher-rank parameters excluded so the instantiation closure is decidable and compile time bounded.

Templates are type-checked once against declared bounds BEFORE instantiation (Rust-style, not C++-post-expansion-style), so diagnostics are template-level and machine-readable rather than fanning out per instance.

Dynamic dispatch remains a separate, explicit, restricted construct (D002/D003) — round-1's leading-candidate architecture — and generic dispatchable methods stay excluded from dyn interfaces pending the escape-hatch design spike; the D003 composition hole is carried as a documented limitation, not papered over.

No IR-level generic ABI, witness tables, or shared-body machinery enters the core now: the D005/F009 sharing-hybrid axis stays open exactly as round-1 gated it — behind the F003 shared-body discharge check and the mono-vs-shared-vs-dictionary measurement program with pre-committed thresholds.

Legitimate per-type divergence (SIMD widths, layout-specific loop shapes) is expressed as explicit, individually-checked overloads/specializations visible in source — never as unchecked divergence from a template — with coherence rules making wrong-instantiation selection a hard resolution error.

The load-bearing provisional cards D001, D002, D003, D005, D007 survive adversarial verification per the caveats.md standing rule; if D001's concrete-code-equivalence claim falls, this ruling is revisited.

The AI-codegen experiment program runs and does not show that writers are dramatically more reliable emitting checked near-duplicate copies than instantiating templates; a strong contrary result reopens the question at the level of form, not principle, since the checked-copy design still contains the template mechanism.
verdicts.rationale: The null hypothesis is that generics are not in the core, and the prosecution must show the named alternative carries the load. The ruling turns on a structural finding: the alternative does not instantiate the null hypothesis. To declare and CHECK that copies instantiate a common template, the language must contain a parameterized template sub-language, once-checked template well-typedness against bounds (or diagnostics fan out per-copy, post-expansion), and a computable instantiation relation copy == template[T]. A compiler that can compute template[T] to check a copy can emit template[T]; the expander is a strict subset of the checker. So the 'cut' keeps essentially all of generics' language complexity, discards only the deterministic expansion step — the one part machines do perfectly — and adds back: O(instantiation-closure) token mass, regeneration cascades on template edits, writer-side whole-program closure computation (D001/D005/D010 show compilers do this on demand), N-fold diagnostic fan-out, and a new drift channel (checker acceptance bugs ship undetected wrong programs — the prosecution's 'detected-late drift, never miscompilation' claim is wrong on inspection, since an admitted divergent copy is compiled faithfully into a semantically wrong artifact). The prosecution's own risk list concedes the two remaining holes: 'mechanism regrowth' into a parametric type system living inside the checker, and checked-divergence escape hatches that reinstate exactly the unchecked near-duplicate regions the CHECK exists to eliminate. The defender's dilemma stands: full substitution-equality makes every copy a redundant echo of compiler output; anything weaker institutionalizes an unverifiable drift surface in a charter where verification matters more, not less. What the prosecution genuinely proved is granted and shapes the form of the keep: D001 means generics add no per-instance optimizer information, so the case for compiler-side expansion rests on cross-copy identity, deferral of the specialize/share decision (D004, D005, F009 — the axis round-1 explicitly held open pending measurement, which source-level pre-expansion would foreclose irreversibly), demand-driven instantiation throttling D009-class over-specialization, and check-once/instantiate-many verification with F003 obligations transferring by substitution. The prosecution's legitimate fears — inference/solving subsystems, F009-style metastasis into IR, witness-table ABI, the F003 shared-body question — are severable, and the ruling severs them: the kept core is monomorphization-only with explicit instantiation, which deletes that open-question cluster from the shipped core as effectively as cutting would, without paying the alternative's costs. J001/J002 settle the endpoint question in the keep's favor: every performance strategy converges on concrete-type specialization, the information demand is constant and only the channel differs, and a bounds-checked template with compiler expansion is the cheapest channel with zero guard/deopt machinery and zero redundant source. Why keep_essential rather than needs_evidence: the missing empirics (drift rates, token magnitudes, mono-vs-shared bloat — all EMPIRICAL-UNTESTED, all D-cards provisional per caveats.md) arbitrate the eventual FORM of generics (mono-only vs bounded-sharing vs Swift-style hybrid), which round-1 already holds open behind a measurement program. They do not arbitrate the in/out decision, because the collapse argument is logical, not empirical: both parties' designs contain the template mechanism, so 'out' was never actually on offer — only 'in, plus a redundant serialized expansion with worse trust properties.' Verification necessity is thereby proven in the only sense available: the anti-drift check both sides require IS parametric generics, and generation-by-construction dominates check-after-generation. The verdict is decisive on that ground and honest about the rest: if adversarial verification breaks D001, or the AI-codegen experiments show template abstraction catastrophically degrades writer reliability, the question reopens — at the level of surface form, not of the mechanism's presence in the core.
followUps: Run the missing AI-codegen experiment: implement identical functionality as (a) generic template plus explicit instantiations, (b) N written-out copies under a substitution-equality checker, (c) N unchecked copies; measure drift rate, token/context cost, repair-loop iterations, and whether writers reliably regenerate all copies after a template edit. This is the corpus's first AI-writer evidence and directly tests both parties' EMPIRICAL-UNTESTED claims.

Execute round-1's measurement program with pre-committed decision thresholds: monomorphization vs shared-body vs dictionary-passing on runtime, code size, i-cache, and compile time, including rustc share-generics deduplication data — this arbitrates the held-open form of the kept feature.

Run the round-1 decisive construction-level check before any sharing extension: can a shared/erased generic body soundly discharge F003 noalias/alias.scope obligations, and at what precision loss; record as a new evidence card.
Adversarially verify D001, D002, D003, D005, D007 per the caveats.md standing rule; this ruling leans hardest on D001 and flags it for priority.

Design the explicit-instantiation surface: how the writer declares instantiation sets, how missing instantiations surface as machine-readable resolution errors, and cross-unit instantiation deduplication semantics (D004 boundary sensitivity).

Execute the round-1 escape-hatch design spike for the D003 composition hole: generic methods on dyn interfaces, instantiation at erased types, heterogeneous generic registries — close the hole or card its cost as a known limitation.

Specify the checked per-type specialization/overload mechanism (the legitimate-divergence channel): declaration form, coherence/ambiguity rules, and how the optimizer distinguishes a deliberate specialization from the template path.

Resolve the antecedent charter question round-1 flagged: whether performance transparency means a predictable cost model or a guaranteed-optimization floor — it gates whether the compiler may silently devirtualize or de-duplicate what the writer wrote explicitly.

Surface the N/A/C/J card series in a re-weighed dispatch debate (round-1 ran on the D/F subset only); J001/J002 entered this trial but the C and N series remain unexamined for generics-relevant evidence.

verdicts.optimizerRole: Split by sub-feature. (1) Implicit value-changing conversions are optimizer-NEGATIVE and are ruled out of core regardless of any future experiment: N001/N002 establish that numeric semantics are per-operation optimizer contracts (wrapping vs nuw/nsw-poison), so a compiler-inserted conversion silently swaps which contract governs with no source token, and D010 shows conversions perturb which method is selected and specialized (D001). This is incompatible with the numeric-semantics round's leading candidate (named, truthfully-lowered modes) — an implicit conversion is unnamed by construction. Both parties effectively agree here; the defender conceded all value-changing conversions. (2) Type inference per se contributes nothing the optimizer consumes: optimizer facts are boundary/intent annotations (ownership modes per F001/C004, numeric modes per N002, effects, shapes/layouts per A001) plus compiler analysis (N004-style derived facts can exceed writer precision). Inference only determines which CHANNEL — writer text or checker derivation — produces interior type facts. The corpus's own dispatch-generics candidate keeps one implicit path (guaranteed static specialization), establishing the governing principle: compiler-implicit is acceptable when the choice is guaranteed and semantics-invariant, unacceptable when it selects semantics. Local synthesis of a uniquely-determined interior type is the former; implicit conversion is the latter. (3) The alternative's per-binding LAYOUT/MODE mandate is itself optimizer-negative and rejected: F007/J004 show allocation/representation decisions are analysis-conditional; F002's payoffs (register promotion, load/store elimination) require the optimizer to own interior representation; F009/A002/A006 evidence the winning architecture of keeping representation and schedule decisions late and separable. No card evidences a per-binding layout mandate, and the null hypothesis applies to mandates too.
verdicts.verificationRole: This is where the verdict genuinely hinges, and the corpus cannot resolve it. Prosecutor COUNT 2 (mandatory interior annotations are checked redundancy — two derivations that must agree, converting hallucination into a localized type error) is the strongest keep-the-alternative argument; the defender's rebuttal (same-pass annotations are error-correlated with the code they annotate, so the redundancy has near-zero independence and its diagnostic 'annotation is ground truth' heuristic is unsound) is mechanistically plausible via autoregressive conditioning. Both are EMPIRICAL-UNTESTED; the corpus itself flags the gap (round1-aliasing-model.md: no cards on annotation error rates or inference feasibility for internal functions). What CAN be ruled: (a) F001/F003's warning — unchecked writer promises are a miscompilation channel — means any annotation the optimizer assumes must be checked, so annotations are either checked-redundant or unsound-assumed; there is no free third state. (b) D009's silent-degradation exhibit convicts only inference with a dynamic fallback: in a static core where local synthesis is deterministic and ambiguity is a hard error, inference failure is a compile error, not silent dynamic dispatch — the defender's boundary-annotation regime disarms D009's negative scope (heuristic failure under abstract types). (c) Whole-program inference across unannotated boundaries is cut on verification grounds: non-local blame, J001/J002 show reconstruction channels carry guard/deopt machinery, and the defender concedes it. (d) Explicit conversions make every representation change a stated, checkable fact — verification-positive. (e) Trust architecture: C004's auto traits show compiler-DERIVED facts (checker-trusted) versus its negative scope showing manual assertions are the UB channel; under a least-trusted-writer charter, moving derived-fact production into the checker is a verification improvement, provided derived facts are exported in a trusted, machine-readable elaborated form.
verdicts.aiWriterConsiderations: All admissible writer-cost claims on both sides are EMPIRICAL-UNTESTED — the corpus contains zero AI-codegen evidence cards; every statement below is flagged as such. Prosecutor's admissible costs of full annotation: generation/context token inflation (the defender's O(k^2) instantiated-type arithmetic for D001-style pipelines is structurally sound; its practical weight depends on unmeasured code-shape frequency), edit cascades scaling with program size not change size, more compile-error iterations, and unnameable types (closures, monomorphized instantiations) requiring new naming machinery — though Ada-style explicit nominal instantiation shows this is a cost, not an impossibility, and aligns with the dispatch-generics explicit-instantiation candidate. Defender's admissible costs of elision: re-reading AIs must re-derive interior types (a hallucination source) unless the toolchain emits compiler-elaborated fully-annotated views — this mitigation is a hard tooling requirement, and any workflow reading raw source without the elaborator loses it. Drift cuts both ways and is untested in both directions: inference-side, near-duplicate fragments can silently diverge in inferred types from a one-token difference (annotation converts this to an error at the drift site); annotation-side, wrong-but-well-typed annotations at elaboration-driving sites (let x: u8 = 255) are silent semantic decisions, and full annotation maximizes the count of such sites — though explicit literal typing is required under either regime, making this partially a wash. Machine-readable structured diagnostics are a hard requirement under EITHER regime: full annotation multiplies diagnostic volume; local inference must report ambiguity errors with elaboration provenance. Costs credited to cutting inference: no constraint-solver compile time in the iteration loop, no need for the writer to simulate coercion-resolution order to predict what its own code means.
whatMustBeTrue: DECIDED FLOOR (holds regardless of experiment outcome): zero implicit value-changing conversions in core — every representation or numeric-mode change is an explicit, named, mode-carrying operation (N001/N002/D010); even checker-proven zero-runtime-effect subsumption stays out under the null hypothesis unless re-proposed with evidence, and if admitted must emit a machine-readable elaboration record, never be silent.

DECIDED FLOOR: all intent-bearing facts are mandatory and explicit at every function signature, module interface, and generic instantiation — numeric mode, ownership/aliasing capability, effect row, and ABI-visible/public layout at type and interface declarations (F001/F003/C004/N002/F009; round1 aliasing-model, dispatch-generics, numeric-semantics, concurrency leading candidates). No cross-boundary inference of any of these, ever.

DECIDED FLOOR: the alternative's per-binding layout/mode mandate is rejected — interior representation is optimizer-owned (F002/F007/J004/F009/A002/A006); a schedule/layout layer, if added, is separable (A006), not fused into every binding.

If interior type elision is kept (defender's sliver): local synthesis must be deterministic, non-backtracking, defaulting-free (literal types explicit), with ambiguity a hard compile error — this is what disarms D009; any dynamic or heuristic fallback re-opens silent performance loss and voids this ruling.

If interior type elision is kept: the compiler MUST emit a canonical, machine-readable fully-elaborated form (every type/mode/effect explicit) as the re-read artifact for AI writers AND as the substrate for a consistency checker that diffs elaborations of near-duplicate fragments — this is the required consistency-checking mechanism for repeated code; without it the prosecutor's inference-side drift scenario stands unmitigated.

If interior annotations are instead mandated (prosecutor's regime minus layout): the language must provide nominal naming machinery for currently-unnameable types (explicit instantiation declarations, named closure types), and the redundancy-independence experiment must have shown same-pass annotations actually catch writer errors at rates justifying the measured token/cascade costs.

The IR verifier (ir-strategy candidate) must reject facts not originating from stated-and-checked or checker-derived sources, closing the back door of inference/coercion leaking in via macros, codegen templates, or convenience front-ends (prosecutor's toolchain-consistency point, unrebutted).

Round1 mode vocabularies (ownership, capabilities, numeric modes, effects) must stabilize before mass code generation in either regime; annotation-vocabulary churn is a systemic rewrite risk that scales with annotation density.

Card caveat: D/A/C/J citations (D001/D009/D010/C004/A001-A006/J001-J004) are direct-extraction and not adversarially verified per caveats.md and round1-index; the sub-rulings leaning on them (especially the D009 disarming and the layout rejection's J004 leg) must be re-checked when those cards are verified.
verdicts.rationale: The feature as bundled is largely dispatched, but its live core is undecidable on this corpus, so the honest verdict is needs_evidence with a decided floor. What is decided: (1) Implicit conversions are cut — the prosecutor's COUNT 3 is fully card-backed (N001/N002: conversions silently reassign per-operation optimizer contracts; D010/D001: they perturb dispatch and specialization) and the defender conceded everything but a zero-runtime-effect subsumption sliver, which the null hypothesis also excludes absent evidence. (2) Whole-program/cross-boundary inference is cut — D009's silent degradation, J001/J002's reconstruction machinery, non-local blame, and the defender's own concession; every signature, interface, instantiation, mode, and effect is mandatorily explicit, consistent with all four round1 leading candidates. (3) The named alternative is REJECTED in its literal form: 'layout and mode at every binding' is contradicted by the corpus's strongest architecture cards (F007/J004: representation is analysis-conditional; F002: pinning forfeits the exact documented payoffs; F009/A002/A006: keep representation decisions late and separable), and 'every binding and call' founders on D001-unnameable types without new machinery neither side priced. The prosecutor's own filed 'boundary-drawing risk' concedes the decisive blur: its permitted 'bottom-up checking from annotated leaves' and the defender's 'local inference inside annotated boundaries' differ only in whether a let-binding restates a type the checker already uniquely determines. That residual question — is same-pass interior annotation independent checked redundancy that catches AI error (prosecutor COUNT 2), or correlated noise costing O(k^2) tokens and edit cascades (defender horn b) — is precisely an AI-writer empirical question, flagged EMPIRICAL-UNTESTED by both parties, sitting in a gap the corpus itself documents (round1-aliasing missing-cards note; the numeric round's 'uncarded fourth channel' of compiler-inferred facts, which also caps how much the prosecutor's 'stated facts are load-bearing' premise can claim). Ruling it either way today would violate the standing rule that proposals cite evidence and state what remains unproven. Leading candidate carried forward pending experiments: boundary-mandatory, intent-explicit core — zero implicit conversions, all intent facts explicit at boundaries, no per-binding layout, interior types produced by deterministic ambiguity-rejecting local synthesis with mandatory compiler-emitted elaboration records serving re-reads and near-duplicate consistency diffing. The experiments below decide whether interior annotation becomes mandatory (flipping to the prosecutor's regime minus layout) or elision stands.
followUps: Redundancy-independence experiment (decides the verdict): matched AI codegen tasks under two regimes — mandatory interior type annotations vs elided interiors with boundary annotations; measure (a) rate at which interior annotations catch real semantic errors the elided regime would compile wrong, (b) rate of correlated wrongness (annotation+code both wrong, typechecks), (c) trivial-mismatch friction errors and iterations-to-green. Directly tests prosecutor COUNT 2 vs defender horn (b).

Token/context economics: total tokens generated plus context consumed for read-modify-write tasks under full annotation vs boundary annotation plus compiler-elaborated views, including deep generic pipeline shapes (tests the O(k^2) claim's practical weight) and re-read error rates with raw source vs elaborated views (tests the defender's mitigation dependency).

Consistency-drift experiment: near-duplicate AI-generated fragments differing by one token (e.g., a literal); measure silent type/representation divergence rates under inferred vs annotated regimes and what fraction each regime's checker catches vs coherent wrongness that typechecks (tests the prosecutor's core drift claim in both directions).

Edit-cascade measurement: propagate one boundary type/effect/mode change; measure edit volume, induced hallucination rate per regenerated site, and loop iterations under both regimes (tests regeneration-cost-scales-with-program-size).

Compile-time delta in the AI iteration loop: syntax-directed checking of fully annotated programs vs deterministic local synthesis at scale, for a type system carrying ownership, effects, and modes (direction is argued structural, magnitude unmeasured; D004 covers only codegen-unit/LTO).

Execute the already-filed numeric backlog item (missing-research-backlog.jsonl, numeric follow-up): measure how much nsw/range-grade optimization LLVM recovers with no frontend flags from types and dominating guards — the 'uncarded fourth channel' that reprices the 'stated facts are load-bearing' premise for both sides.

Explicit-conversion error-rate study: does mandating explicit conversion ops at every representation change produce more wrong-target semantic errors than a checker-proven identity-subsumption sliver with elaboration records (decides whether the defender's conceded sliver is ever re-admitted).

Adversarially verify the load-bearing direct-extraction cards this ruling leans on (D001, D009, D010, C004, J004, A001, A002, A006) per the round1-index standing note, before any regime decision is finalized.

verdicts.optimizerRole: Dynamic dispatch is a carded optimization defeat, not an enabler: D002 documents vtable lookup cost and blocked method inlining; every recovery path in evidence is conditional, revertible, and option-dependent (D007 negative scope, D008 interposition), matching the corpus-wide pattern that recovery-by-optimization is never a guarantee (F007, J004, J002). The round1 leading candidate concedes the point by stating a dyn cost model that does not rely on devirtualization — pricing dyn as a permanent indirect call. D009 establishes that function-valued indirection is the cost driver regardless of language packaging, so a dyn construct buys zero performance floor over a typed function-pointer table at genuinely dynamic sites, while the alternative keeps every closed-set site on the corpus's best-attested mechanism: D001 guaranteed-static, per-arm direct, inlinable calls that preserve F003 per-callee noalias discharge against named targets. Dyn's only residual optimizer value — carrying structured hierarchy/finality facts (D006) for D007-class devirtualization — is an upside the candidate's own cost model disclaims and LLVM WPD is uncarded; a feature cannot be kept on an optimization channel its own cost model refuses to price. The prosecutor's F009 turn is legitimate: explicit switches and explicit typed tables are the maximally optimizer-visible dispatch representation; compiler-synthesized vtables behind an abstraction are the less visible one.
verdicts.verificationRole: This is where the case is actually decided, and it splits. Against dyn: a dyn call site is a universally quantified obligation over an open implementer set; adding an implementer triggers no site-level diagnostic — silent behavioral extension is the worst failure mode for an unattended fallible writer. A switch is a syntactically closed callee set: exhaustiveness is machine-checked, contracts are checkable per named target, and variant-set growth produces a machine-readable, site-enumerated edit list — exactly the diagnostic channel the charter demands. For the defense: the BARE alternative manufactures three unchecked-invariant classes the charter forbids — (a) data/table coupling (Circle payload with Square table row: well-typed wrong behavior or UB over void*), (b) cross-site semantic agreement (K exhaustive-but-divergent switch sites; dyn makes one-type-one-behavior structural via a single impl), (c) F003 noalias obligations become unverifiable once payloads exit the ownership checker via erasure — and the round1 critique itself carded hand-rolled void*/fn-pointer erasure as the predicted failure mode of an unmitigated ban (A1 weakness 4). Ruling: the defender's attacks defeat the bare cut, not the checked cut. Every hole is closed by requirements (named typed table fields, construction-checked coupling, payloads inside the ownership discipline, banned wildcard arms, single-point-of-definition tables), and the residual existential arises only at genuinely open implementer sets, which a closed-world core excludes by construction — sum types make sets closed; open sets belong to the undesigned periphery (D008 class), where the dyn question is remanded, not settled.
verdicts.aiWriterConsiderations: All claims here are EMPIRICAL-UNTESTED — the corpus contains zero AI-codegen evidence. Generation cost favors dyn: O(1) call and O(1) impl edit versus O(N) arms per site and O(K) site regenerations on variant addition; K×N near-duplicate arms are the canonical drift substrate. Re-read cost favors the alternative: a switch enumerates its full target set at the site, while a dyn site forces retrieval of every implementer into context to reason about behavior. Compile time in the iteration loop favors the alternative for stated performance (no LTO/WPD/speculative machinery needed; D004/D007 taxes avoided), though variant-set changes invalidate K units versus one (D004) — mitigated by canonical tables. Diagnostics decisively favor the alternative for a fallible writer: exhaustiveness failures are local, enumerable, mechanically executable to-do lists; dyn's failure modes (new implementer silently absorbed, wrong registration, stale override) produce no compile-time signal at all, and D003-class dyn-compatibility errors are nonlocal trait-level diagnostics over a larger rule surface. The drift risks are symmetric, not one-sided: the alternative risks arm-body divergence across sites (addressed by the required single-point-of-definition tables); dyn risks impl-vs-contract divergence and zero-edit silent extension. Since neither side's writer-behavior claims are measured and the risks roughly offset, the null hypothesis breaks the tie against the feature.
whatMustBeTrue: Sum types with compiler-checked exhaustive dispatch are core, and wildcard/default arms are banned (or require an explicit audited opt-out) in checked dispatch contexts, so variant addition fails closed at every site rather than being silently swallowed.

Typed operation tables are a blessed, verifier-supported language form: per-operation NAMED fields (index-addressed/positional tables prohibited), per-row signature checking, and table payloads that remain inside the ownership/F003 discipline — void*/untyped erasure has no sanctioned core form. This discharges the defender's coupling and F003-erasure attacks, which are valid against a bare cut.

Table/payload coupling is checked at construction: tables are built per variant through a checked constructor form (or as records of closures capturing typed payloads), so pairing payload X with table Y is a type error, never a latent runtime miscall.

Single-point-of-definition consistency checking of repeated code: one canonical table per (variant-set, operation) with a compiler-enforced one-definition-per-(variant, operation) rule; ad-hoc switch sites over the same variant set either lower to canonical-table lookups or are flagged. This converts the defender's strongest surviving structural point (cross-site arm-body drift is invisible to exhaustiveness checking) into a checked invariant instead of a reason to keep dyn.

On any variant-set change, the compiler emits a machine-readable, site-enumerated edit list (file, site, missing arm/row) as a mechanical repair plan — the diagnostic contract that makes O(K) propagation executable by a fallible writer.

First-class typed function values/closures remain core (both sides assume them; D009 makes their cost class explicit). It must be acknowledged that a closure is a degenerate single-method existential, so a record-of-closures is the sanctioned residual idiom for open-ish dispatch; its cost versus a fat-pointer trait object (N env+code pointers vs 1+1) is uncarded and must be measured, since this is the crack through which restricted dyn could legitimately re-enter.

The core is closed-world for dispatch: genuinely open implementer sets (dynamic linking, FFI callbacks, D008-class interposition boundaries) live in the periphery, whose fact-attenuation design round1 already lists as an undesigned precondition. The periphery design must revisit checked open-set dispatch and MAY reinstate a restricted, D003-style dyn construct there; this verdict cuts it from the core only.

The F003 noalias/alias.scope discharge-through-indirect-bodies construction check (round1's flagged decisive follow-up) is run against LLVM semantics; it prices indirection for tables and closures just as it would have for dyn, and its result becomes an evidence card constraining the table mechanism's alias-fact story.
verdicts.rationale: The null hypothesis holds, but only because the alternative is promoted to a language requirement; a bare cut would fail the charter. (1) Optimizer necessity is not proven: D002 cards dyn as a documented optimization defeat; all recovery is conditional and revertible (D007/D008, pattern-matched by F007/J004/J002); the round1 leading candidate's own dyn cost model disclaims devirtualization, pricing dyn as a permanent indirect call; and D009 shows indirection itself is the cost driver, so the construct adds zero performance over checked tables at open sites while closed sites are strictly better served by D001-path exhaustive switches with direct, per-arm-inlinable calls preserving F003 per-callee discharge. LLVM WPD — the defense's only unpriced upside — has no evidence card. (2) Verification necessity half-succeeds and that half is absorbed as requirements: the defender correctly shows the unchecked alternative manufactures three invariant classes (payload/table coupling, cross-site arm agreement, F003 on erased payloads) that a fallible writer cannot be trusted to keep, and the round1 critique itself carded hand-rolled void* erasure as the predicted failure mode of an unmitigated ban. But every hole closes under the required checked forms, and the defender's convergence argument (the checked alternative IS the feature) only bites at genuinely open implementer sets — which a closed-world core excludes by construction via sum types, remanding open-set dispatch to the undesigned periphery (D008) where restricted dyn may yet be reinstated. Meanwhile the alternative wins the charter-weighted diagnostics contest outright: exhaustiveness violations and variant-addition edit lists are local, enumerable, machine-readable repair plans, whereas dyn silently absorbs new implementers with no site-level re-verification trigger — the worst failure mode for an unattended writer. (3) Compiler simplicity: cutting dyn removes the D003 rule subsystem, vtable synthesis, fat pointers, and unsizing coercions from the trusted core, and D003's exclusion of generic dispatchable methods means keeping dyn would not even close the heterogeneous-generic-API hole — sum-type dispatch closes it better, since switch arms call generic per-variant code freely. (4) Why not needs_evidence: the untested empirics (open-site prevalence, drift rates, O(K)-edit magnitude) do not arbitrate between the designs — the F003-discharge check prices indirection identically for both once erasure is banned, and the writer-drift risks are symmetric (K×N arm drift vs silent-extension/impl-contract drift) — so under the standing evidence rule ties break to the null. The verdict is decisive on today's cards and names its reopening conditions: the periphery design, the record-of-closures cost measurement, and first AI-codegen drift data.
followUps: Run the round1-flagged construction check: can shared/erased/indirect callee bodies soundly discharge F003 noalias/alias.scope obligations against LLVM semantics, and at what precision loss versus direct per-variant code; record the result as an evidence card (it prices indirection for tables, closures, and any future periphery dyn alike).

Produce the first AI-codegen evidence cards: measure writer drift and repair success on (a) compiler-edit-list-guided O(K) switch-site updates after variant addition versus (b) O(1) dyn-style single-impl edits, and (c) arm-body divergence rates across K duplicate switch sites with and without the canonical-table one-definition rule.

Measure prevalence: in representative AI-written extreme-performance codebases, what fraction of dispatch sites have closed, write-time-enumerable target sets — the load-bearing assumption that switches, not tables, carry most weight.

Build the LLVM whole-program devirtualization dossier (!type metadata, -fwhole-program-vtables, virtual-function elimination) with version-dated sources — the uncarded mechanism behind any future case for reinstating dyn.

Design the core/periphery fact-attenuation mechanism for FFI/dynamic-linking boundaries (D008 class) and, within it, the checked open-set dispatch construct; explicitly re-try the restricted D003-style dyn question at that boundary, where write-time enumeration is genuinely impossible.

Resolve the closure/first-class-function dispatch gap (D009; round1 lists it as unaddressed by every position): specify the record-of-closures idiom as the residual open-ish dispatch form and measure its cost (size, indirection count, i-cache) against a fat-pointer trait object — the honest test of the defender's convergence argument.

Quantitative measurement with pre-committed thresholds: exhaustive switch versus indirect table call versus (periphery) vtable call on runtime, code size, i-cache, and branch-predictor behavior at varying arity — the corpus has zero quantitative dispatch cards (caveats.md).

Adversarially verify the load-bearing provisional cards D001, D002, D003, D007, D009 per the caveats.md standing rule before this verdict hardens into a spec; this ruling inherits their provisionality.

verdicts.optimizerRole: Net negative-to-neutral, and therefore insufficient for core inclusion. The corpus's only direct card on function values is a defeat card: D009 documents Function-typed fields hiding representation/call targets and forcing dynamic dispatch even inside fully closed programs — the round1-dispatch-generics judge used it against the closed-world advocate, and line 52 of that verdict records first-class-function dispatch as a gap no position covered. General closures are implicit members of D002's indirect-call cost class (lookup cost, prevents inlining), recoverable only via D007's conditional/speculative/revertible devirtualization, blocked by D008 interposition, with environment allocation recoverable only via F007/J004's conditional (explicitly not guaranteed) escape analysis, and with J001/J002 showing the profiling/guard/deopt machinery a runtime needs once call targets are values. The defender's counter-asymmetry (guaranteed direct calls via closures-as-unique-static-types) is real but not distinctive: its 'exactly two realizable encodings' claim for the alternative is FALSE given the dispatch-generics leading candidate — an explicit env struct passed as a type parameter implementing a call interface, monomorphized per D001, yields the identical guaranteed-direct-call, exact-layout machine code. The restricted closure IS compiler-performed defunctionalization; the optimizer sees no difference. So closures add no optimizer capability the mandated alternative lacks, while unrestricted closures add D009-class defeats and an all-TBD verified-lowering obligation (llvm-mlir-capability-map closure-capture row). The defender's minimal-footprint argument (capture lists feeding F001/F002/F003 facts) is partially valid — exact capture lists guarantee footprint minimality where env structs make it a convention — but footprint SOUNDNESS is equal in both designs under the checked-ownership aliasing leader, minimality-payoff magnitude is uncarded, and misleading-comparisons #2 flags callback lowering to noalias as unresolved for every design. Per decision-gates.md, even optimizer-attractiveness would not suffice for a default; closures do not clear the lower bar.
verdicts.verificationRole: This is the genuine contest, and closures' one real contribution must be reconstructed in the alternative rather than used to keep capture semantics. The defender's strongest point: mandatory explicit capture lists give a bidirectional exactness check (no unlisted free variable, no unused capture) plus by-name binding at the creation site, whereas the manual triple (struct definition, population site, function body) has no native correspondence check — a stale or over-wide env struct type-checks. But the defender's killer instance, snapshot-vs-live, is SYMMETRIC on inspection: under the ownership-based aliasing leader, an env-struct field's declared type (owned T vs &T vs &mut T) carries exactly the same declared, compiler-checked capture-mode information as an explicit capture-mode annotation; the wrong choice type-checks in both surfaces, so 'the intent is no longer declared anywhere' is overstated. The recoverable residue is therefore: (1) exactness — must become mandated core ERRORS over env structs (unused field, uninitialized field, dead dispatch variant, non-exhaustive dispatch), not lints, as the prosecutor conceded; (2) by-name binding — population-site wrong-referent wiring (.x = wrong_but_type-compatible_var) remains checkable only by type, not by name, in the alternative; this is the one verification property that cannot be fully reconstructed and is the strongest surviving argument for a later checked-desugaring layer, pending the named experiment. Cutting the feature also DELETES verification obligations: capture inference, closure conversion as a semantics-preservation proof burden in the verifier-checked IR strategy, and the entirely-TBD capability-map row; F004's negative scope (lifetime/provenance/escape rules precede strong allocation facts) says anonymous escaping environments are precisely the hard case the memory-object model would otherwise have to settle first. C004 Send/Sync checks apply to env structs as ordinary structs with no new machinery.
verdicts.aiWriterConsiderations: All AI-writer behavioral claims on both sides are EMPIRICAL-UNTESTED — the corpus contains zero AI-codegen evidence (caveats.md). Ledger as judged: (1) Token/context cost — the alternative loses: each function value becomes struct + top-level fn + construction wiring with globally unique names, and re-reading a call site requires pulling nonlocal definitions into context; conceded, admissible under the charter, magnitude unmeasured. (2) Consistency drift — the alternative's most serious cost, but the mandated diagnostics (see requirements) convert missing-field/arity/stale-shape drift into machine-readable compile errors; the residual silent channels are population-site wrong-referent (type-compatible but wrong variable) and snapshot-vs-live field-type choice — the latter symmetric with capture-mode choice under closures, the former genuinely worse without by-name binding. (3) Edit amplification — the defender's central-enum objection is valid against tag-enum defunctionalization but not against the mandated generic-parameter encoding, which is the required hot-path form; tag enums are confined to genuinely heterogeneous stored-callback sets, where the defender itself concedes closed enums beat dyn function values for optimizer and verifier alike. (4) Diagnostics — env-struct errors are ordinary struct/ownership errors the core must emit anyway; capture diagnostics would entangle with an aliasing model that has no carded callback story (round1-aliasing-model line 52). (5) Distribution shift — AI writers trained on closure-rich corpora may emit lambda-shaped code or defunctionalize incorrectly; symmetric risk (wrong captures that type-check in a capture-bearing core) and untested in both directions. Compile-time in the iteration loop: unmeasured, plausibly a wash (more source volume vs deleted capture-inference/closure-conversion/escape-analysis phases).
whatMustBeTrue: The language MUST provide the guaranteed-direct-call encoding: env structs passable as type parameters implementing a call interface, monomorphized under the dispatch-generics leading candidate (D001), so parameterized-algorithm callbacks are never forced through fn-pointer+env indirect calls; the dispatch leader must itself survive its verification program (F003-discharge check, code-size measurement).

The language MUST mandate machine-readable core ERRORS (not lints) reconstructing capture-list exactness over the manual artifacts: unused env-struct field, field used but never initialized, dead dispatch variant, non-exhaustive tag dispatch, signature mismatch between env struct and consuming function — with diagnostics that name all three artifacts (struct, function, construction site) so the AI repair loop is single-hop.

The language MUST make the snapshot-vs-live choice explicit and coercion-free: env-struct field types (owned vs shared-borrow vs exclusive-borrow) are the declared capture modes, checked by the ownership core (C004/F001 machinery), with no implicit copy/borrow coercion at population sites.

Escaping and heterogeneous function values route ONLY through the explicit, restricted D003-style dynamic construct (or closed tag-enums with exhaustiveness checking); Function-typed fields with hidden call targets (D009's defeat shape) must be inexpressible in the core.

Structured-array body regions (A002/A006/A010 surface) must be specified as second-class, non-escaping, capture-free-or-explicitly-parameterized regions, with the closure/region line drawn precisely so later rounds cannot smuggle first-class capture back in through loop bodies.

The toolchain must enforce single-definition discipline for repeated callback patterns (dedup detection of structurally identical env-struct/function pairs across modules) to contain cross-module duplication drift.

The aliasing model must acquire a carded story for borrows stored in env structs lowering to F003 noalias/alias.scope facts — misleading-comparisons #2 names callbacks as the fact-destroyer, and this verdict inherits that unresolved obligation.

The load-bearing provisional cards D001, D002, D007, D009 must survive adversarial verification (caveats.md standing rule); if D009 or the D007-conditionality asymmetry falls, the cost side of this ruling must be re-weighed.

The AI-writer drift experiment (see follow-ups) must not show a dominant silent-semantic-divergence rate for mandated-diagnostic defunctionalization versus checked capture-list closures; if it does, a capture-list desugaring layer that compiles to exactly the mandated encoding should be added — reversing the surface decision without touching this ruling's core semantics.
verdicts.rationale: The null hypothesis stands, but only because the alternative is promoted to a language requirement. On the evidence: the closures/captures coverage row rests on a single card, D009, at low_to_medium confidence — and D009 is an optimizer-defeat card; the llvm-mlir capability map's closure-capture row is all TBD; no F/A/C/J card attests any benefit of capture semantics; and decision-gates.md bars admitting features on optimizer-attractiveness alone, a bar closures do not even reach. Both design_candidate_later leaders are structurally hostile: the dispatch leader admits exactly one implicit path (guaranteed static specialization) plus an explicit restricted dyn construct, and the aliasing leader has no carded callback story at all (round1-aliasing-model line 52; misleading-comparisons #2). The defender's case is the strongest possible for the feature and it still fails at its load-bearing joint: the claim that the alternative has only indirect encodings (D002/D007/D008 cost class) or tag-enum apply loops is refuted by composition with the corpus's own leading generics candidate — an explicit env struct passed as a monomorphized type parameter is machine-code-isomorphic to the defender's 'closures as unique anonymous types consumed by specializing generics.' The defended restricted form IS compiler-performed defunctionalization; since the optimizer cannot distinguish them, optimizer necessity is not proven, and the defense's real content is (a) requirements the alternative must satisfy (guaranteed direct calls via the generic encoding, checked capture-mode declaration, non-escaping guarantees by construction rather than F007/J004-conditional recovery) and (b) a verification residue (bidirectional exactness, by-name binding) plus EMPIRICAL-UNTESTED drift-rate claims that cannot overcome the null hypothesis but do define the reopening experiment. The defender's killer snapshot-vs-live instance is symmetric once env-field types are recognized as declared capture modes under the ownership core; the prosecutor's 'every drift mode is a compile error' is likewise overstated (population-site wrong-referent and field-type choice type-check), which is exactly why this is replace_with_alternative rather than cut_from_core: a bare cut leaving fn-pointer+env as the idiomatic encoding would reinstate D009's defeat shape everywhere, and a cut without mandated exactness diagnostics would hand a fallible-at-scale writer the three-artifact drift channels unchecked. Cutting deletes real obligations — capture inference, closure conversion as a verified-IR proof burden, the TBD lowering row, and the F004-flagged anonymous-escaping-environment complication to the memory-object model — while the escaping/heterogeneous residue lands in the already-planned explicit dynamic construct, where the defender itself concedes closed tag-enums serve optimizer and verifier better than erased function values. This verdict is evidence-conditional per the standing rule: every load-bearing D-card is a provisional direct extraction, and the named experiment can reopen the surface (not the semantics) as a checked desugaring layer.
followUps: Run the decisive AI-writer experiment (currently zero AI-codegen evidence in corpus): same task suite, same model, comparing (a) manual defunctionalization with the mandated exactness diagnostics vs (b) explicit-capture-list closures desugaring to identical IR; measure silent-semantic-divergence rate (especially snapshot-vs-live and wrong-referent wiring), fraction of drift caught at compile time, repair-loop length per diagnostic class, and tokens generated/re-read. Pre-commit a threshold at which the desugaring layer is added.

Execute round1-dispatch-generics follow-up line 68 as amended by this ruling: add a design position and evidence cards for function-value dispatch, now scoped to the mandated encoding (env-struct type parameters, explicit dyn residue, tag-enum heterogeneous sets).

Run the F003-discharge construction check for the explicit dynamic construct and tag-enum apply bodies (named-but-unexecuted follow-up from round1-dispatch-generics line 59) — it arbitrates the footprint-precision residue of the defender's case.
Adversarially verify D001, D002, D007, D009 per the caveats.md standing rule before further weight is placed on this verdict.

Produce the aliasing-model callback card: how ownership-checked borrows stored in env structs lower to noalias/alias.scope, resolving misleading-comparisons #2 for the mandated encoding; treat as a blocking prerequisite alongside memory-object-model.md's open questions.

Specify the non-escaping body-region construct for the structured-arrays surface (A002/A006/A010) and document the precise closure/region boundary as a spec artifact, so later rounds cannot reintroduce capture semantics through loop bodies.

Replace the llvm-mlir capability map's all-TBD 'closure capture' row with rows for the mandated encoding (env-struct generic specialization, explicit dyn construct, tag-enum dispatch), each with preconditions, IR constructs, consuming passes, and verifier checks.

Stress-test workload coverage: generate representative async-continuation, event-callback, and stateful-iterator-adapter code under the mandated encoding and measure env-struct proliferation and cross-module duplication, testing the prosecutor's untested claim that structured ops plus top-level references cover the closure workload.
Design the dedup/single-definition toolchain check for structurally identical env-struct/function pairs across modules, and measure its false-positive rate on generated code.

verdicts.optimizerRole: None that is unique to the feature. By optimization time, macro-expanded and AI-pre-expanded code are indistinguishable inputs (F002: the mechanism depends on proven non-interference, not on how text was produced), so in-language expansion contributes zero to the extreme-performance goal per se. The one genuine optimizer-necessity argument the defense raised — preserving parametric structure so the specialize-vs-share decision stays in-compiler (D001 vs D005, and the F009/Swift-SIL fourth model the dispatch round flagged as unexamined) — is real and verified against round1-dispatch-generics.md, but it is carried by the typed-generics feature adjudicated in that topic, not by macros/comptime; the defender conceded this coupling explicitly. Comptime-derived constants feeding fact channels (N004 range, F003 noalias, N005 inbounds) is the residual optimizer claim, and it is answerable without staging: facts about literal constant data can be compiler-DERIVED by inspection, which is equally sound and requires no evaluator. A006 (Halide) cuts prosecution's way at card level: optimization choices as checkable program STRUCTURE the writer can emit directly, with a negative scope denying transfer of the staged-DSL machinery to a general language.
verdicts.verificationRole: This is where the case was actually decided, and it cuts both ways. Against keeping: an in-language Turing-complete evaluator enlarges the trusted surface in exactly the direction the corpus's confirmed pattern forbids — F006 (SPARK) achieves true-by-construction facts by RESTRICTING semantics to a side-effect-free fragment; the ir-strategy verdict's non-negotiable soundness rule disqualifies uncheckable trusted contracts; a CTFE stage must bit-match the treacherous runtime numeric contract (N001 UB/poison ladder, N002 flag semantics) or become a cross-stage miscompile generator; and generator verification forces either late per-instantiation checking or a quantified staged type system with no supporting card. Zero staging keeps every obligation first-order, per-site, decidable. Against a bare cut: the defense proved two structural verification gaps in the naked alternative — (a) cross-copy consistency ('these N functions instantiate one pattern') is stated in no artifact, so no in-language checker can exist at ANY drift rate; (b) AI-precomputed constants asserted into UB-bearing channels are exactly the writer-trusted contracts the ir-strategy round disqualified. Both gaps are closable by requirements outside the trusted compiler (provenance-checked deterministic generation; compiler-derived-not-writer-asserted constant facts), which is why the verdict is replace_with_alternative rather than cut_from_core: the alternative carries the load only if those obligations are made mandatory.
verdicts.aiWriterConsiderations: All admissible machine-writer claims on both sides are EMPIRICAL-UNTESTED — the corpus contains zero AI-codegen evidence cards and zero metaprogramming cards of any kind (verified by full-corpus search). Conceded-real costs of the alternative: O(N)-copy token generation and re-read on every pattern edit vs O(1) definition edits; consistency drift across near-duplicates (the strongest defense card — and its structural point stands: without a pattern artifact, drift is undetectable in-language at any rate); N-fold diagnostics without expansion provenance; update amplification moving regeneration latency into the AI loop; per-copy contract restatement multiplying proof obligations. Conceded-real costs of keeping: unbounded (even fuel-bounded) CTFE makes compile time a hazard inside the AI iteration loop (D001/D004/D009 negative scopes flag specialization compile-time costs, quantified nowhere per caveats.md); a second evaluation semantics the writer must model creates a new error class (defender's honest concession); expansion-backtrace diagnostics point into code that exists in no file, whereas literal-source diagnostics point at text the writer actually wrote — the prosecution's repair-loop asymmetry claim is plausible but untested. The verdict routes the writer-cost burden to mandatory toolchain requirements (deterministic external generators as source-of-record, provenance records, diagnostic aggregation to pattern-level repair sites) rather than into the trusted compiler.
whatMustBeTrue: The language MUST include a closed, decidable, trivially-terminating constant-expression sublanguage (built-in arithmetic/layout/target-parameter constants only; NO user-defined function evaluation at compile time, hence no fuel, no hygiene, no cross-stage name resolution) so that array sizes, layout constants (A001-adjacent), and numeric-mode constants remain statable. 'Zero staging' is hereby defined as: no user-visible compile-time EXECUTION semantics and no code-producing stages — not 'no constant folding'.

Optimizer facts about constant data MUST be compiler-derived by inspection of literals (ranges, alignment, sizes) or compiler-checked against stated contracts before emission into UB-bearing channels (F003 noalias, N002 nsw/nuw, N004 range, N005 inbounds). Writer-asserted facts about constants are forbidden — this closes the defense's hallucinated-table miscompile channel and satisfies the ir-strategy round's disqualification of uncheckable trusted contracts.

Consistency-checking of repeated code MUST exist as a toolchain requirement: intended-identical or pattern-instantiated code regions carry machine-readable provenance (generator identity, canonical inputs, content hash); the build re-runs deterministic external generators and diffs their output against the source of record, failing the build on divergence. This is the drift detector the defense correctly showed cannot exist in-language under zero staging — it is relocated outside the trusted compiler, not waived.

The generics boundary is drawn crisply: parametric, type-checked-before-instantiation generics with in-compiler instantiation remain the sanctioned single-definition mechanism under the dispatch-generics candidate (D001/D002/D003), and this cut MUST NOT be read as mandating AI-side monomorphization or foreclosing the explicitly-open D005 bounded-sharing / F009 fourth-model axis — that decision belongs to the dispatch-generics topic and its ordered measurement program.

Target parameterization (vector widths, cache-line sizes, cfg variants) MUST be expressible through the constant sublanguage's target-parameter constants or through per-target provenance-checked generation, so A007-style hardware baking does not multiply unverifiable source variants.

If the arrays-loops prototype adopts a schedule layer (A006), it MUST be declarative structure interpreted by the compiler, with schedule SEARCH and autotuning living in the AI/tooling loop and landing as concrete checked structure; no in-language schedule generation. This reconciles the zero-staging ruling with round1-arrays-loops.md's leading candidate.

Diagnostics MUST be machine-readable and point at literal source; provenance records must let tooling aggregate N copy-local diagnostics for a shared defect into one pattern-level repair site, answering the diagnostics-multiplication cost.

Any future derive/annotation-processor or 'just one small macro' proposal MUST be adjudicated as external tooling against this verdict, not admitted as a core feature; violation semantics for provenance-check failures slot into the build system, not the graduated-obligations framework (which remains research_needed).
verdicts.rationale: The null hypothesis survives, but the naked alternative does not — hence replace_with_alternative. (1) The keep is undischargeable today: the corpus contains zero macro/comptime/staging/CTFE evidence (verified by full-text search across all notes, debates, synthesis, and implementation files; the missing-research backlog does not list it), and caveats.md's standing rule requires exact card citation. The defense honestly conceded its case is 'a design candidate argument, not a carded conclusion' and surrendered syntactic/token/AST macros outright, so keep_essential is unavailable. (2) The defense's most powerful material — preserving parametric definitions so the specialize-vs-share axis stays a compiler decision (D001/D005, F009 fourth model, all verified against round1-dispatch-generics.md) — is genuinely strong but belongs to the dispatch-generics feature, which already keeps typed in-compiler instantiation as its leading candidate. Judged within its own remit, metaprogramming's unique load reduces to comptime value computation, derive-style generation, and cross-copy consistency. (3) For that residue, the corpus's only confirmed directional evidence favors restriction over evaluation: F006's true-by-construction-via-restriction pattern, F009's facts-below-source lesson, and the ir-strategy round's disqualification of uncheckable trusted contracts all argue against embedding a Turing-complete evaluator that must bit-match the N001/N002 numeric contract inside a compiler whose charter is verifiable simplicity. (4) But the prosecution's own concessions establish that a bare cut is incoherent: constant expressions must exist anyway, and the defense proved two rate-independent verification gaps (undetectable cross-copy drift; writer-asserted constant facts feeding UB channels). These are closable only if the alternative is promoted from option to obligation — deterministic external generation with build-enforced provenance diffing, and compiler-derived (never writer-asserted) constant facts. The verdict therefore cuts user-visible staging from the core and binds the language and toolchain to the eight requirements listed. All AI-writer behavioral claims on both sides remain EMPIRICAL-UNTESTED; they set the follow-up program and the reopening conditions, not the ruling, because the structural case does not hinge on them.
followUps: Run the drift experiment: have an AI edit one of N near-duplicate expanded regions across realistic edit cycles, with and without provenance/diff tooling; measure divergence rate and, critically, the fraction of divergence that escapes type/contract checking. Reopening condition: if provenance tooling cannot hold escaped-drift near zero, revisit this verdict's cut of in-language single-definition mechanisms.

Measure token/context economics at repository scale: generation plus re-read cost of fully-expanded vs parametric source, and whether longer contexts measurably raise AI defect rates in this regime (no cards exist; charter-admissible cost).

Measure compile time end-to-end: N pre-expanded source copies vs one definition plus N in-compiler instantiations, folded into the dispatch-generics measurement program already ordered (mono vs shared-body vs dictionary-passing; runtime, code size, i-cache, compile time).

Run the repair-loop asymmetry experiment: AI fix success rate and latency on literal-source diagnostics vs expansion-backtrace diagnostics into generated code — the prosecution asserted the former wins; untested.
Validate determinism and stability of the external-generator pipeline across edit cycles (the alternative's load-bearing tooling assumption), including provenance-record ergonomics for the AI writer.

Conduct a workload census of comptime-value demands (lookup tables, layout constants, target parameters, FFI shims per the runtime-abi dossier) to confirm the closed constant sublanguage plus external generation covers the demand. Reopening condition: if the census shows sustained pressure to grow user-defined compile-time evaluation, re-adjudicate a fuel-bounded pure fragment on that evidence.

Track the dispatch-generics follow-ups that couple to this verdict: the F003 shared-body noalias discharge check and the Swift generics-ABI dossier (F009 fourth model). Reopening condition: if that topic resolves toward IR-level parametric bodies with richer staged surface, the generics/staging boundary drawn here must be restated, though the macro/comptime cut itself is unaffected.

State the zero-staging constraint explicitly in the arrays-loops prototype brief: schedule structure in-language and declarative; schedule search in the AI/tooling loop; verify emitted schedule facts survive lowering and are consumed by passes (the end-to-end fact-consumption gap that round already flagged for every position).

verdicts.optimizerRole: No carded pass consumes "T implements I" as an optimization fact: what backends attestedly eat is concrete-code facts — alias/non-interference (F001, F002, F003), reductions/inductions/FP-flags/loop-shape (A002, A005, A010), purity/effects (F006). The prosecution wins this sub-point cleanly. Interfaces' optimizer role is therefore indirect on both paths: the static path elaborates to exactly the concrete monomorphized functions a writer could emit directly (D001), and the dynamic path is a carded defeat (D002 vtable/no-inlining) with only conditional, revertible, option-dependent recovery (D007, D008); Julia evidence makes concreteness, not declared abstraction, the performance-bearing property (D009, D010). The real optimizer stakes are option-shaped, not conformance-shaped: a generic body present in the artifact is the prerequisite for compiler-side instantiation dedup, D005-style bounded sharing, and the F009/Swift-SIL model of optimizer-decided specialization — levers writer-side concretization forecloses permanently — and a language-known explicit dispatch construct prevents hand-rolled fn-pointer erasure, the D009 call-target-hiding defeat that round1-dispatch (A1 weakness #4) explicitly predicts when no sanctioned path exists. C004-class capability predicates (Send/Sync) let the optimizer treat non-atomic memory as unshared. Net: conformance-as-fact has zero attested optimizer value; implicit dynamic dispatch is net-negative and no one defends it; artifact-level generic structure has real but unmeasured option value on an axis round1 ruled empirically unarbitrable.
verdicts.verificationRole: The strongest surviving argument in the trial is verificational and favors some grouping construct. Law annotations are UB-bearing optimizer contracts (F003; N002 "contracts, not mere annotations"; misleading-comparisons note 5), sound only if writer obligations are true (F001 negative scope). Writer-side concretization multiplies the independently-trusted assertion surface by the duplication factor and makes the invariant "these N functions implement one contract" inexpressible — post-hoc equivalence of drifted copies is undecidable. A contract group restores checkability (one contract site, one checked conformance per member); bounds additionally convert algorithm preconditions into compiler-checked obligations; a single generic body makes cross-copy body identity true by construction. Three caps: (a) the defense concedes the generic-body advantage over group-checked copies is site count plus by-construction identity, not a difference in kind — an impl can drift from its contract exactly as a copy can drift from its annotation; (b) the argument's weight scales with the unresolved checked-vs-trusted status of law annotations (no purity-check evidence exists; round1 cross-topic gap), and neither side has prototype evidence that laws on concrete functions survive lowering and are consumed end-to-end; (c) trait machinery adds verifier obligations (coherence, bound solving, D003 dyn-compatibility) that discharge no optimizer-consumed fact. Critically, the prosecution's own consistencyRisks concede provenance-grouped, compiler-checked cross-copy obligations — which is the contract-group half of interfaces reconstructed under another name. Both rulings therefore need the contract-grouping kernel; only the generic-body increment is genuinely contested.
verdicts.aiWriterConsiderations: Every writer-behavior claim on both sides is EMPIRICAL-UNTESTED — the corpus contains zero AI-codegen evidence. Admissible costs cut both ways. Cutting: O(N·K) source tokens per algorithm family, N-site change fan-out per edit inside the iteration loop, context inflation and stale-copy retrieval risk from near-duplicates, and the canonical drift substrate where a silently divergent regenerated copy plus a stale law annotation becomes an F003/N002-class miscompile channel. Keeping: a trait-resolution/coherence stage in every compile (unquantified; D001/D004 negative scopes), a hallucination surface in bounds/coherence/dyn-compatibility rules (D003) that discharge no optimizer fact, and non-local solver diagnostics (uncarded — no diagnostics evidence exists in the corpus at all). Neither magnitude is measured; the prosecution's deterministic-expander mitigation is undesigned, and the defense's claim that definition-site bound diagnostics shorten AI repair loops is asserted structurally, untested behaviorally. Citation-grade corrections found on review: C004 is a provisional direct extraction (feature-evidence-coverage.csv concurrency row: direct_source_extracted_needs_adversarial_verification), not workflow-confirmed 3-0 as the defense stated; and F004 attaches noalias-return per function — tying it to a Clone/Allocator-style interface contract is uncarded inference. The prosecution's reversibility claim is also only half-true: sugar can be added later, but writer-side concretization erases family identity from the artifact and forecloses the D005/F009 levers, so both directions carry irreversibility.
whatMustBeTrue: Law/effect annotations must be compiler-checked (proof obligations or verified properties), not merely trusted: if trusted, both the N-copy alternative and per-impl trait laws are drift channels into F003/N002-class UB, and both sides' verification cases reduce to site-count arithmetic on unchecked assertions (misleading-comparisons note 5).

Under any cut, the language must still provide the interface-shaped kernel both cases converge on: named contract groups (signature + law bundles) with compiler-checked per-member conformance and cross-copy annotation consistency; type-level capability predicates (C004-class, required by the round1 concurrency leading candidate); and an explicit closed-world dispatch construct (sum types + exhaustive match) — otherwise D009-style hand-rolled erasure and unchecked cross-copy drift follow. The prosecution's own risk list concedes this machinery, and it is currently undesigned.

Under any keep, the kept core must be restricted to decidable, coherent, non-overlapping resolution with guaranteed static specialization as the only implicit path and dynamic dispatch only via the explicit D003-style restricted construct — matching, not reopening, the round1-dispatch leading candidate; open-world implicit dyn is out under every position heard.

This feature ruling must not silently decide the monomorphization-vs-shared-body axis in either direction: round1-dispatch explicitly held it open pending measurement (zero quantitative cards on runtime, code size, i-cache, compile time), and writer-side full concretization is that axis decided in extremis.

AI drift rates across regenerated near-duplicate copies versus error rates writing bounds/impls must be measured before writer-side concretization is relied on at scale — the load-bearing behavioral claims of both cases are currently unmeasured (zero AI-codegen evidence in corpus).

The load-bearing dispatch cards (D001, D002, D003, D005, D007) must survive adversarial verification per the caveats.md standing rule before any final ruling hardens; feature-evidence-coverage.csv rates both dispatch rows low_to_medium confidence.
verdicts.rationale: The trial decomposes cleanly, and the evidence decides the edges but not the pivot. Decided for the prosecution: interface conformance has zero attested optimizer value (no card shows any pass consuming an implements-fact; A005/F001-F003/A002/A010 all attach to concrete code), the dynamic path is a carded defeat with only conditional recovery (D002, D007, D008), and the trait rule-surface (D003 dyn-compatibility, coherence, bound solving) is verifier burden that discharges no optimizer-consumed fact. Decided for the defense: the named alternative as stated cannot carry the load — annotations on concrete functions only cannot express C004-class per-type capability predicates the round1 concurrency candidate requires, cannot state the cross-copy invariant whose absence turns regeneration drift into F003/N002-class miscompilation, and leaves the round1-dispatch candidate's explicit dyn construct without a domain; the prosecution itself concedes provenance-grouped compiler-checked cross-copy obligations, which reconstructs the contract-group half of interfaces under another name. Hence plain cut_from_core fails (the alternative does not carry the load as named) and keep_essential fails (necessity unproven: the optimizer case for keeping is option-preservation, not attested consumption; the verification case — the strongest single argument heard — hinges on the unresolved checked-vs-trusted status of law annotations, concedes site-count-not-kind, and partly rests on a mis-graded citation, C004 being provisional rather than workflow-confirmed). The genuinely contested residue is narrow: bounded quantification — whether a single generic body with guaranteed specialization lives in the core, or writers concretize into checked contract groups. That pivot is exactly the axis round1-dispatch ruled empirically unarbitrable (zero quantitative cards; the F009 fourth model unexamined; the F003-discharge constructive check never run), now compounded by AI-writer unknowns on which the corpus has zero evidence (drift rates, token magnitudes, repair-loop dynamics). Reversibility does not break the tie: sugar can be added later, but concretization erases family identity from the artifact and permanently forecloses the D005/F009 levers. Under the caveats.md standing rule and the corpus null-hypothesis discipline, ruling the pivot today would be a values commitment dressed as an evidence-driven one. Verdict: needs_evidence — with the decided sub-parts binding as recorded constraints (no implicit dynamic dispatch in core under any outcome; contract-group kernel, capability predicates, and explicit closed-world dispatch required under any outcome) and the deciding experiments named in followUps.
followUps: Run the corpus's first AI-codegen experiment, which directly arbitrates the pivot: generate the same algorithm family three ways — (a) bounded generic + per-type impls, (b) N concrete copies inside a checked contract group, (c) N unguarded concrete copies — across repeated regeneration/edit cycles; measure semantic drift rate, law-annotation desynchronization, source-token and context cost, compile-loop latency, and repair iterations from diagnostics; card the results.

Execute the round1-named constructive check: determine against LLVM semantics whether a shared/erased generic body can soundly discharge F003 noalias/alias.scope obligations, and at what precision loss versus per-instantiation code; record as an evidence card (this arbitrates whether guaranteed specialization must be the only path).

Run the round1 measurement program with pre-committed decision thresholds: monomorphization vs shared-body vs dictionary-passing on runtime, code size, i-cache behavior, and compile time, including rustc share-generics/instantiation-dedup data to bound mono-only code-size risk.

Resolve the checked-vs-trusted status of law annotations: prototype whether associative/pure/non-interfering annotations can carry proof obligations or property-test harnesses that survive lowering and are consumed by passes end-to-end (round1 cross-topic gap) — the weight of both sides' verification arguments scales directly with this.

Design-spike the common kernel now, safe under any verdict: a named contract-group construct (signature + law bundle, per-member conformance checking, provenance metadata) with no generic bodies and no dispatch; check whether it plus sum-type/exhaustive-match dispatch suffices to define the domain of the D003-style explicit dyn construct without full trait machinery.

Adversarially verify D001, D002, D003, D005, D007 per the caveats.md standing rule before the next hearing on this feature; both dispatch rows in feature-evidence-coverage.csv sit at low_to_medium confidence.

File the coupling record: any final ruling here amends round1 dispatch-generics (dyn construct domain, guaranteed-specialization surface) and concurrency-model (C004 capability predicates) verdicts, and must be entered as a coupled amendment, not an independent decision; also correct the record that C004 is provisional, not workflow-confirmed.

verdicts.optimizerRole: None carded.
