Every confirmed optimizer enabler in the corpus is semantic — aliasing/non-interference (F001, F002, F003), ownership (F006), numeric modes (N002), specialization/compile-time channels (D001, D004), memory/layout facts (A001) — and no card attributes any performance benefit to infix, precedence, sugar, or elision. Surface notation is erased at parse; both grammars yield the identical checked tree, so cutting notation forfeits zero optimization power. The corpus explicitly deferred syntax (source-to-ir-lowering-sketches.md: 'No syntax decisions yet'; caveats.md: scaffolding must not decide source syntax; A001 negative scope: 'Does not decide source syntax'). If anything, the corpus's practice points toward the alternative: N006 shows optimizer infrastructure already operates on single canonical forms, and F009's lesson is that performance-critical structure should be visible to tools rather than buried in implicit forms.
verdicts.verificationRole: Negative for the feature, positive for the alternative — and verification is the decisive axis here. Every desugaring, precedence-resolution, and elision-inference rule is frontend transformation surface whose semantics-preservation must be proven and maintained; F003's negative scope (facts sound only if frontend obligations are true and survive lowering), the misleading-comparisons entry ('IR metadata solves source design' is misleading because metadata is sound only if frontend semantics are sound), open-questions.md's historical-failure list ('unsound frontend metadata emission'), and round1-index.md's cross-topic gap (no prototype validation that emitted facts survive lowering) all mark the frontend as the pipeline's soundness chokepoint. N006's Alive2 discipline implies each desugaring rewrite demands proof-grade validation; a zero-sugar core incurs zero such obligations. F006 (SPARK) is direct precedent for restricting surface expressiveness to keep the source-to-logic mapping simple. Additionally, elision of contract-bearing facts (aliasing/ownership per F001/F003, numeric modes per N002, effects, boundary types) would either destroy the explicit contract channel or force unverified re-inference — forbidden under the writer-fallibility premise. The canonical alternative makes the stored artifact identical to the checked tree and enables a checksum channel: writer-stated inferable facts cross-checked against inference, mismatch = hard error.
verdicts.aiWriterConsiderations: All AI-writer behavioral claims on both sides are EMPIRICAL-UNTESTED — the corpus has zero AI-codegen evidence cards, and the null-hypothesis win on syntax is procedural (syntax was out of scope by selection), not empirical. Verified in this hearing: the defender's token-cost proxy reproduces (S-expression forms cost 1.35–1.48x proxy tokens and 1.93x characters vs infix on six expression-dense kernel fragments; script at /private/tmp/claude-501/-Users-bytedance-Dev-xlang/035e62ef-9ecd-42d5-b288-f6f92231c257/scratchpad/tokcount.py) — but this is a regex proxy on fragments, not real BPE on whole programs, and declaration/control-flow-heavy code will inflate less. The two load-bearing untested hypotheses cut in opposite directions: (a) transcription-distance errors — converting infix spec formulas to prefix form induces silent operand-order/associativity errors that type-check and are invisible to the verifier; (b) precedence misbinding — writers trained on C-family corpora silently misparse their own infix under a misremembered precedence table, an error class canonical form eliminates by construction. Neither rate is measured; the codec question hinges on their difference. Uncontested machine-writer wins for canonical form: byte-detectable consistency drift across near-duplicates, deterministic O(n) parsing with local error reporting, node-path machine-readable diagnostics, content-addressed caching in the iteration loop (compile-time is a carded cost channel, D001/D004). Training-distribution penalty for an unfamiliar canonical form is an admissible, unquantified cost.
whatMustBeTrue: The language defines exactly one canonical surface form: one spelling per semantic construct, one legal byte-level formatting, grammar tree isomorphic to the checked core representation; non-canonical input is a hard compiler error, not auto-formatted.

Consistency-checking of repeated code is a first-class toolchain obligation, not a passive benefit: content-addressed subtree hashing, duplicate detection, and drift reports across near-identical AI-generated blocks must be emitted by the compiler, since byte-canonical form only pays off if the toolchain actually surfaces drift.

Contract-bearing facts are never elidable in the stored artifact: aliasing/ownership (F001/F003), numeric mode selection (N002 — each arithmetic node names exactly one mode), effects, and types at function/module boundaries are always explicit; any compiler-inferred fact is immediately re-elaborated into the stored canonical form.

Writer-stated inferable facts are legal and cross-checked against inference with mismatch as a hard error (redundancy as hallucination checksum), replacing the verification value that elision would have silently discarded.
Diagnostics are machine-readable node paths into the canonical artifact the writer emitted, with deterministic local parse-error recovery — no resugaring machinery, no heuristic cascade errors.

Parse/typecheck/verification results are content-addressed and cached on canonical bytes, converting the surface decision into iteration-loop latency wins (the carded compile-time channel, D001/D004) that offset the measured token-verbosity cost.

The canonical grammar is designed to minimize gratuitous verbosity without adding alternate spellings (short fixed operator atoms, flat n-ary nodes for provably associative same-mode operations), directly attacking the one measured cost of the cut.

The cut is policed at the toolchain boundary: no pretty-printer, macro layer, or out-of-core dialect may introduce a second stored spelling; any future write-path render codec must be bijective, version-pinned, enforce a parse-print-parse fixpoint invariant, echo only canonical form in all compiler output, and is admissible only after the gating A/B experiment succeeds.

Local type inference and similar elision questions that interact with the type-system debates (checked ownership, static specialization) are explicitly not pre-decided by this ruling; whatever those debates admit must still re-elaborate into the fully explicit stored artifact.
verdicts.rationale: The prosecution wins on the core and the defense conceded it: under the corpus standing rule (caveats.md — cite exact cards or it does not ship) and the null hypothesis, human-oriented syntax holds an empty evidence hand. All confirmed enablers are semantic (F001–F009, N, A, D, C, J); syntax was explicitly deferred by the corpus (source-to-ir-lowering-sketches.md, caveats.md, A001 negative scope). On verification — the axis this project weights heaviest — sugar and elision are pure liability: each rule adds unverified frontend transformation surface at the exact soundness chokepoint the corpus flags (F003 negative scope, 'unsound frontend metadata emission' in open-questions.md, round1-index's lowering-survival gap), while N006's Alive2 discipline prices every rewrite at proof-grade cost and F006 (SPARK) is precedent that verification-first languages restrict surface expressiveness. This is replace_with_alternative rather than cut_from_core because the canonical form is not a passive default — it becomes a load-bearing requirement: the prosecution's benefit column (drift detection, node-path diagnostics, content-addressed caching, single-spelling dedup) only exists if the language mandates and polices those properties, so they are spelled out as obligations. Why not needs_evidence: the genuinely open empirical questions (token-cost ratio with real tokenizers — the 1.35–1.48x proxy reproduced in this hearing; transcription-distance vs precedence-misbinding error rates) govern only the defender's narrow write-path infix codec, and that codec is additive tooling over a fixed canonical core — a bijective renderer can be admitted later behind the defender's own A/B experiment without reopening the core decision. The core ruling is robust to either experimental outcome, since even the defender's proposal stores and echoes only canonical form. Deciding the core now is therefore safe and decisive; the codec stays out until evidence exists. All AI-writer behavioral claims remain EMPIRICAL-UNTESTED and are gated accordingly.
followUps: Run the gating A/B codegen experiment before admitting any infix write-path codec: identical kernel specs rendered to both grammars; measure generation tokens (real model tokenizers, whole programs, not the fragment proxy), first-parse success rate, silent semantic-error rate via differential testing against reference implementations (specifically operand-order/associativity swaps vs precedence misbindings), and repair iterations to green.

Prototype the canonical grammar with node-path diagnostics and subtree hashing; measure parse/elaboration share of end-to-end compile latency and the realized content-addressed caching benefit in a simulated AI repair loop (D001/D004 channel, currently frontend-unquantified).

Test the drift hypothesis: whether byte-canonical single-spelling code measurably reduces consistency drift across AI-generated near-duplicate blocks, and whether drift scales with per-copy verbosity.

Measure the training-distribution penalty: initial defect rates of current models emitting the canonical form vs infix, and how fast the gap closes with in-context examples — this bounds the transition cost of the ruling.
Open a syntax/AI-codegen evidence lane in the corpus (new card IDs) — every behavioral claim in this debate is currently uncardable, and the null-hypothesis win is procedural, not empirical.

Write the toolchain-boundary policy document: allowed render layers, mandatory parse-print-parse fixpoint invariant, codec version pinning, and canonical-only storage/echo rules, so the cut cannot silently un-cut itself.

Coordinate with the type-system debates (aliasing-model, dispatch-generics, numeric-semantics) on which elisions are actually inference questions owned by those topics, keeping the invariant that stored artifacts are fully elaborated.

verdicts.optimizerRole: Unwinding contributes zero confirmed optimizer benefit in this corpus and carries the corpus's only confirmed EH card as a cost: F008 (3-0, generalization LOW) shows representation choice constrains optimization — funclets forbid register allocation for values live into/out of them, and landingpad is only better *relative to funclets*. Both classic performance stories are unavailable: 'zero-cost EH keeps machinery off the normal path' was refuted 0-3 (refuted-and-unverified.jsonl rows 1-2, needs_manual_recheck), and 'exceptions are always slow' is a flagged misleading comparison (#4) — so neither side may argue from speed; the null wins on burden. Structurally (flagged as uncarded extension by the prosecution itself), unwind edges add implicit CFG edges and mid-function memory-observation points at every may-throw call, taxing exactly the F002-class payoffs (register promotion, dead-store elimination, reordering) the aliasing-heavy corpus exists to unlock. The replacement keeps error semantics as visible, branch-based dataflow: Result<T,E> monomorphizes to concrete discriminated values under the dispatch-generics leading candidate (D001), matching the F009/SIL lesson that performance-critical semantics be visible IR structure; A005 shows the corpus's only carded runtime-recovery mechanism (checks + versioning) is branch-based and needs no unwinder; N003 prices the guard barrier that both designs pay identically, confining the dispute to unwinding's marginal CFG/regalloc cost — which no card exonerates.
verdicts.verificationRole: Verification is where the cut bites hardest in the feature's disfavor: exception safety is the worst invariant class for a fallible machine writer — implicit, cross-cutting, compiler-unchecked, exercised only on rare paths — while Result propagation is type-checked at every call site, so drift is caught mechanically. Drop-during-unwind synthesizes cleanup CFGs the writer never wrote or re-reads, enlarging the N006-style Alive2 validation surface of the verifier-checked IR candidate (structural claim, not measured). But the defender's verification counter-case identifies real obligations the bare alternative does not meet: (1) trap-with-report — the ONLY carded post-violation observability story (C002 Go halts; round1-violation-semantics names it explicitly) — requires stack attribution, so the alternative's wording 'no unwinding machinery anywhere' over-cuts: descriptive stack-walk metadata (CFI tables or frame pointers) must be carved out of the cut, as it powers diagnostics and the static-vs-profile candidate's offline profile channel without importing F008-class codegen constraints (this metadata-vs-execution distinction is load-bearing and itself uncarded). (2) Under trap=abort, the verification loop gets one diagnostic per process death and failure-path external-state cleanup becomes unexercisable — real costs, but of untested magnitude, and they are toolchain/harness questions (multi-process isolation, checked-tier design in the still-open violation-semantics debate), not grounds for core-language unwinding semantics. (3) 'Cleanup always runs' is explicitly NOT a language invariant under this verdict; no design doc may assume it.
verdicts.aiWriterConsiderations: All AI-writer claims on both sides are EMPIRICAL-UNTESTED — the corpus has zero AI-codegen evidence. The prosecution's decisive writer argument is directionally sound: unwind-safety invariants fail silently across near-duplicate edits (no local diagnostic when a throw-only path breaks), whereas Result drift is caught at each type-checked call site; and with unwinding, a function's true CFG is absent from its token stream, raising re-read/edit cost. The defender's best writer argument survives and must be answered by the replacement's requirements, not dismissed: Result-only error *context* (cause, location, chain) hand-built per propagation site is a canonical silent-drift class because context-dropping variants type-check, while panic backtraces are runtime-generated at zero token cost. The remedy adopted here is to make error context by-construction in the language: auto-derived propagation context/cause chains (zero hand-written tokens per site) plus verifier-enforced propagation rules, restoring the zero-drift property without unwinding. Conceded and admissible: Result plumbing inflates tokens and creates propagation boilerplate to generate and re-read; a two-channel taxonomy (Result for expected errors, trap for contract violations) risks inconsistent classification across modules without a language-enforced rule; hot-path pressure risks in-band sentinel encoding without anti-sentinel lints. Whether these token/drift costs outweigh the verifiability gain is untestable from this corpus.
whatMustBeTrue: Result<T,E> lowers to concrete branch-based code under guaranteed static specialization (D001) with every propagation site verifier-checked; no hidden runtime machinery reappears in the lowering.

Trap-with-report + abort is a sufficient machine-readable diagnostics channel for an automated writer (C002 is the only adjacent precedent; round1-violation-semantics lists post-deployment observability as an open gap).

Descriptive stack-attribution metadata (CFI tables or frame pointers) can be emitted for trap reports and offline profiling WITHOUT reimporting F008-class codegen constraints — i.e., the metadata/execution-machinery distinction holds at implementation time (currently uncarded).

A multi-process test/fuzz harness keeps AI iteration-loop wall-clock acceptable despite one-diagnostic-per-execution and loss of warm in-process state (EMPIRICAL-UNTESTED; the defender's strongest cost claim).
AI writers maintain explicit Result plumbing more reliably than implicit exception-safety invariants, and auto-derived error context eliminates the per-site context-drift class (EMPIRICAL-UNTESTED).

Foreign unwinds (C++ exceptions, Rust panic=unwind) can be reliably firewalled with an abort-at-boundary rule at FFI edges (evidence-free both directions; ffi_abi_runtime backlog card is missing_primary_source, priority high).

The violation-semantics checked tier (graduated obligations, still research_needed) can be designed around trap=abort semantics, or its round-2 outcome does not require in-process trap containment as core-language semantics.
A language-enforced Result-vs-trap classification rule plus anti-sentinel lints prevent error-channel drift across modules (rule design uncarded).
'Cleanup always runs' is accepted as a non-invariant: external-resource cleanup after aborts falls to the OS or explicit design patterns, and no other design document silently assumes otherwise.
verdicts.rationale: The null hypothesis is exclusion and the corpus cannot pay inclusion's burden: the only confirmed EH card (F008, 3-0 but generalization LOW) is cost-side; both exculpatory performance claims sit refuted 0-3 in refuted-and-unverified.jsonl with caveats.md ordering them preserved against reintroduction; misleading-comparisons #4 simultaneously bars the prosecution's speed rhetoric — so the case correctly reduces to burden-of-proof plus verification economics, and there the feature loses. Decisively, the defender CONCEDES catchable source-level exceptions, so the actual dispute is not the feature on trial but three residues of the alternative's over-broad wording. I rule on each. (1) Stack-walk metadata: the defender is right that 'no unwinding machinery anywhere' over-cuts — machine-readable trap reports (the brief's own admissible requirement, C002 the only carded precedent, named by the round1-violation-semantics verdict) and the static-vs-profile candidate's offline profile channel need stack attribution. But CFI tables are descriptive metadata, not unwinding execution (no personality functions, no cleanup execution, no funclet/landingpad lowering carrying F008 costs); carving them out amends the alternative rather than keeping the feature. (2) Checked-build unwinding for test-harness containment: this hinges entirely on EMPIRICAL-UNTESTED loop-economics claims, is coupled to a debate the corpus itself marks research_needed with uncarded checked-tier mechanics, and imports the dual-mode divergence risk the defender honestly names as its own strongest standing objection. It is a toolchain-implementation question, not core-language semantics; the core defines trap=abort with universal nounwind, and the harness question goes to the research track. Cutting core semantics now does not pre-decide it, provided the follow-up experiments are actually run. (3) FFI: the backlog gates this area from design_candidate status, and the gate cuts both ways — so the verdict ships with a provisional abort-at-boundary rule explicitly flagged evidence-free pending the ffi_abi_runtime card. The verdict is replace_with_alternative rather than cut_from_core because the bare alternative does not carry the load without named language requirements: verified Result propagation riding D001 monomorphization; trap-with-report with stack-attribution metadata; auto-derived error context to neutralize the defender's context-drift argument (the strongest surviving pro-unwinding point); a language-enforced Result-vs-trap classification rule; anti-sentinel lints; a declared process-isolation doctrine to prevent catch/recover bolt-ons; and the explicit invariant downgrade that cleanup does not run on abort. It is not needs_evidence because no untested claim, resolved either way, would put catchable exceptions or drop-during-unwind back in the core of a language whose corpus shows confirmed costs, refuted exculpations, and zero benefit cards — the untested claims shape the alternative's obligations and the toolchain, and are named as follow-ups.
followUps: Manual recheck of the two refuted LLVM EH claims folded into a three-way benchmark: Result-return vs landingpad-style unwinding vs trap=abort on representative kernels, measuring hot-path speed, code size, compile time, and binary size (unwind tables vs discriminant branches) — the single most decision-capable missing artifact for this topic.

Produce the ffi_abi_runtime primary-source card (unwinding boundaries, ABI) and design/cost the abort-at-boundary shim for foreign unwinds crossing native frames; until then the FFI rule in this verdict is provisional.

Card the stack-attribution options: unwind-table/CFI emission vs universal frame pointers — codegen cost, object size, and whether CFI emission is truly free of F008-class constraints; also confirm the (currently uncarded) claim that sample-based offline profiling requires one of them.

Run the controlled AI-codegen study the brief anticipates: (a) drift rates in hand-written vs auto-derived Result context (type-correct context loss), (b) violation rates of implicit exception-safety invariants under near-duplicate edits, (c) consistency of a two-channel Result-vs-trap taxonomy across a large generated codebase.

Measure in-process trap containment vs multi-process respawn wall-clock per detected defect in a trap-heavy AI test/fuzz loop; if containment wins decisively, revisit ONLY the toolchain-internal checked-tier mechanism (never source-level catch) in the violation-semantics round 2.

Constrain violation-semantics round 2 with trap=abort as the release-mode failure semantics and require it to specify checked-tier diagnostics under abort, plus what a trap means under racing threads (concurrency-model coupling, C001/C002 undecided).

Specify and prototype the verifier/lint layer this verdict makes mandatory: auto-derived cause-chain propagation, anti-sentinel (in-band error encoding) detection, and the language-enforced Result-vs-trap classification rule; validate that these closes the consistency-drift surface across repeated propagation code.

verdicts.optimizerRole: For the optimizer the feature-as-charged is a documented net negative, and this part is decided on carded evidence, not the null hypothesis alone. Every carded appearance of a compilation/linkage boundary in this corpus is a pathology or its expensive cure: D004 (more codegen units inhibit optimization; LTO buys back whole-program visibility at longer link time), D007 (LTO/IPA/devirtualization are conditional, option-dependent, revertible, and cost compile time/memory/code size), D008 (interposition — an ABI stability semantics — blocks IPA, inlining, and propagation even for statically known code). The confirmed payoff facts (F001/F002 non-interference, F003/F004 noalias, F009's keep-facts-visible anchor) are exactly what a frozen internal ABI would attenuate at every module edge, and the ir-strategy verdict independently names every added boundary "a fact-loss and miscompile surface." The defender CONCEDED stable internal ABI, interposition, and separately-optimized codegen units, so release-mode whole-program closed-world optimization is uncontested. Two honesty caveats bind this role: (1) closed-world visibility makes devirtualization/specialization POSSIBLE, not guaranteed — the dispatch critic showed no card backs "guaranteed devirtualization," inliner heuristics remain heuristics, and D009-class function-typed values hide call targets inside fully closed programs; (2) the corpus has zero ABI/linking primary sources (ffi_abi_runtime backlog, priority-high), so the absence of pro-ABI evidence is selection-shaped — the cut rests on the carded boundary pathologies plus the standing rule, and the missing ABI research must still be done because the FFI wall inherits all of it.
verdicts.verificationRole: Verification is where the real contest was, and the ruling splits it. The prosecutor is right that separate compilation converts globally checkable facts into trusted interface summaries: F003 facts are UB-bearing promises "only sound if frontend obligations are true," and a stale summary (module A compiled against yesterday's declaration of B) is a silent miscompile channel of exactly the unchecked-invariant class this language exists to eliminate. A closed world makes version skew impossible rather than detected — a genuine verification win in principle (mechanism follows from F003's soundness conditions; incident-level evidence like Rust's noalias miscompile history remains uncarded). But the defender's strongest point survives the cut and becomes a REQUIREMENT on the alternative: the writer is fallible at scale, so there must be a declared, redundant, independently checkable second statement of intent, or a coherently-hallucinated caller/callee pair regenerated together type-checks and ships. Crucially, that second statement does not need to live at module granularity: the aliasing-model design candidate (checked ownership in the type system) and F006 (SPARK: facts true by construction via a checking toolchain enforcing DECLARED restrictions on subprograms) put the declared-contract locus at the function signature, re-checked against bodies on every build. The defender's own residue confirms this reduction — their "separate semantic compilation" with compiler-version-internal IR and exact semantic fingerprints is an implementation of incremental checking inside a closed world, and their interface-edit-laundering risk applies identically to any declared-contract scheme. So: no module interfaces, but function-level contract-bearing signatures carrying the fact vocabulary are non-optional, and fact-boundary declarations (FFI, unsafe, reflection restriction per D005/D008 negative scopes) must exist as core constructs even with modules gone.
verdicts.aiWriterConsiderations: All claims in this section are EMPIRICAL-UNTESTED — the corpus contains zero AI-codegen evidence; both parties correctly flagged this. Admissible machine-writer costs, as ruled: (1) Compile latency in the iteration loop is the alternative's single largest real cost and it is currently unpriced — D004/D007/D001/D009 establish direction (whole-program IPA plus guaranteed-specialization compilation is the expensive regime) but never magnitude (caveats.md: documentation evidence never quantifies compile time). The mitigation (deterministic compiler, content-addressed function-level memoization and dev-mode codegen inside the closed world) is an implementation strategy with no card and no prototype; D004 supports that codegen units are build artifacts, not semantics, so incrementality can be implementation-level. (2) Token/context: module interfaces double as enforced compression for a token-bounded writer; the replacement is compiler-GENERATED interface views with no semantic weight — plausible, unmeasured in both directions. (3) Consistency drift cuts both ways: interface/implementation duplication is itself a drift surface (two copies of every signature), while whole-program regeneration without any second statement permits coherent-pair hallucination with unbounded blast radius; function-level checked contracts are the ruled middle, and contract-laundering (writer edits the declaration to match a wrong body) persists under ANY scheme and needs a gated-edit toolchain policy the language does not get for free. (4) Diagnostics: closed-world global checking surfaces errors far from causes; machine-readable diagnostics must carry cross-file provenance chains to stay actionable for automated repair — the ir-strategy verdict notes the diagnostics advantage claimed for language-level IRs has no supporting card.
whatMustBeTrue: The closed world, no-interposition, and finality are stated as explicit declared language invariants, not left as the absence of a module system — D008's negative scope says the language 'must separately choose module/ABI/interposition rules', and the dispatch verdict already carries these as amendments; the alternative's 'explicit FFI boundary' is module machinery by another name and must be specified as such.

The core/periphery fact-attenuation mechanism at the FFI wall is designed and carded BEFORE the closed-world commitment hardens — the dispatch verdict rules this 'a soundness precondition, not an optimization detail', and the ffi_abi_runtime backlog (missing_primary_source, priority-high) must be discharged since the single FFI boundary now carries all boundary load with no internal-module fallback.

Function-level declared, compiler-checked contracts carrying the fact vocabulary (ownership, effects, aliasing obligations per F001/F003/F006 and the aliasing-model design candidate) exist and are re-verified against bodies on every build — this is the redundant second statement of intent that replaces module interfaces as the drift check against coherently-hallucinated regeneration.
Runtime reflection/metadata is restricted per D005's negative scope, via an explicit per-construct capability declaration, so closed-world assumptions are not silently broken.

Incremental re-checking and dev-mode codegen use exact semantic fingerprints (content-addressed); any weaker cache key (timestamps, names) silently reuses stale discharge of F003/F004 obligations and is a miscompile vector, not an ergonomics bug.

Whole-program compile time and peak memory at realistic AI-generated program scales are measured and acceptable for the iteration loop; if unoptimized incremental dev builds do not suffice (e.g., the loop needs release-quality performance feedback), this verdict must be reopened.
Machine-readable diagnostics carry cross-file provenance chains sufficient for automated repair of nonlocal closed-world errors (ownership/aliasing violations surfacing far from their cause).
The compiler can generate token-compact interface VIEWS of any code region on demand (a tooling artifact with zero semantic weight) as the writer-context substitute for module interfaces.

This verdict is decided jointly with dispatch-generics: if the F009-gestured Swift-style fourth model (separately-compiled generics, witness tables, resilience domains) is later adopted, its entire rationale is a stable ABI and directly contradicts this cut; the coupling must be recorded in the decision log.
Contract edits are a gated, privileged operation in the write toolchain so a writer cannot launder body drift through the checker by rewriting the declaration to match a hallucinated implementation.
verdicts.rationale: The feature as charged is a three-part bundle, and its defining parts fell without contest: the defender formally conceded stable internal ABI, symbol interposition, and separately-optimized codegen units, and the concession is compelled by the corpus — D008 documents ABI-stability semantics blocking IPA/inlining, D004 documents unit boundaries inhibiting optimization with LTO as expensive buy-back, D007 prices the recovery machinery as conditional and revertible, and not one card supports a stable internal ABI (the ffi_abi_runtime area is missing_primary_source, blocking even design-candidate status under caveats.md's standing rule). The null hypothesis therefore holds and keep_essential is off the table. The verdict is replace_with_alternative rather than a clean cut_from_core because the named alternative is not the null — it is a design with obligations the corpus itself identifies: the closed world is a declared module-semantics invariant (D008 negative scope; dispatch verdict amendment), the FFI wall's fact-attenuation is an undesigned soundness PRECONDITION (dispatch follow-up, verbatim), reflection must be restricted (D005), and the verification-first premise demands a replacement for the interface-as-second-statement function — ruled here to be function-level contract-bearing signatures (F006/SPARK precedent, aliasing-model candidate) re-checked from bodies every build, which captures the defender's genuine verification insight without resurrecting compilation-unit semantics. The defender's remaining position reduces, on inspection, to implementation-level incrementality (semantic-fingerprint caching, dev-mode codegen) plus declaration surfaces for fact boundaries — both preserved as requirements, neither needing separate compilation or an ABI. I decline needs_evidence: the cut of the defining components hinges on carded evidence and concession, not on untested AI-writer claims; what is untested is the COST side of the alternative (compile latency, token economics, drift rates, diagnostic repairability — all flagged EMPIRICAL-UNTESTED), and that risk is properly carried as named preconditions and experiments rather than by keeping an unsupported feature in the core. Honest bookkeeping: the corpus is aliasing-heavy by selection and contains no ABI/linking primary sources, so part of this ruling rests on selection-shaped absence; the reopen triggers are recorded (Swift-style generics ABI adoption, concurrency-model verdicts requiring dynamic loading, iteration-loop compile-cost measurements failing).
followUps: Discharge the ffi_abi_runtime backlog item (priority-high): collect and card primary sources on ABI, unwinding boundaries, LTO, GC statepoints, and C/C++/Rust/Fortran interop, then design the core/periphery fact-attenuation mechanism for the single FFI wall — the dispatch verdict's named soundness precondition for any closed-world commitment.

Prototype and price the alternative's unpriced cost: a deterministic closed-world compiler with content-addressed, semantic-fingerprint, function-level memoized checking and dev-mode codegen; measure iteration latency and peak memory against single-shot whole-program builds at synthetic AI-scale program sizes (AI code is plausibly larger and more repetitive than human code per the design premise). Pre-commit reopen thresholds.

Run the AI-writer experiments both parties flagged EMPIRICAL-UNTESTED: (a) rate at which function-level declared contracts catch coherently-hallucinated caller/callee regeneration pairs vs module interfaces vs no second statement; (b) token economics of compiler-generated interface views vs maintained semantic interfaces; (c) machine-repairability of nonlocal closed-world diagnostics with provenance chains vs boundary-anchored module errors; (d) whether contract-edit gating actually prevents laundering.

Card Rust's noalias enable/disable/miscompile history (already an ir-strategy gap): it is the closest real-world incident evidence for the version-skew/trusted-summary miscompile class this verdict claims the closed world eliminates.

Record the dispatch-generics coupling in the decision log and decide jointly: adoption of the F009-implied Swift-style fourth model (witness tables, resilience domains, separately-compiled generics) would contradict this cut; the Swift generics ABI dossier (backlog item, dispatch follow-up) must be built before either verdict hardens.

Revisit this verdict when the concurrency-model topic (research_needed) resolves: a verdict requiring runtime-loaded components (foreign threads, accelerator runtimes per the interop dossier) would force dynamic loading back through the FFI wall or reopen the closed-world commitment.

Specify the contract-edit gating policy and the fact-boundary declaration constructs (unsafe regions, FFI extern regions, reflection capability grants) as core-language surface, since with modules cut these declarations need a home — this is also the ir-strategy follow-up's fact-boundary/escape-hatch artifact, needed under any outcome.

verdicts.optimizerRole: The lifetime regime's job for the optimizer is fact supply. Every carded optimizer enabler in this space is a static, checked non-interference/lifetime contract: F001/C004 (ownership/exclusivity, the corpus's only adversarially-verified statically-discharged non-interference and data-race-freedom mechanisms), F002 (the payoff classes — register promotion, read/write elimination, reordering — flow from proven non-modification), F004 (the strongest allocation contract, fresh-return noalias, is emittable only given lifetime/provenance/escape rules), F006 (checked ownership ships in SPARK), A008 (visible consumption-of-storage buys copy-avoidance in Futhark). Automatic MM supplies zero carded facts and substitutes conditional runtime recovery: F007/J004 (escape analysis eliminates allocations conditionally, explicitly never guaranteed stack allocation; design_generalization_confidence low), J005 (warmup/code-cache costs of profile-driven recovery), C003 (every possibly-shared object forfeits register caching, reordering, write elision). F009 cuts both ways and I credit both readings: it proves that even flagship ARC must UN-hide retain/release as explicit IR instructions with a dedicated optimizer subsystem (the feature imports a compiler subsystem whose job is removing its own costs — prosecution), AND it proves 'visible and checkable' does not entail 'writer-written' — reclamation ops can be compiler-placed, optimizer-visible IR that passes sink, batch, and elide (defense). Net: the optimizer needs checked lifetime contracts and compiler-owned, IR-explicit drop placement; it has no carded need for GC, ambient RC, or invisible drop.
verdicts.verificationRole: Decisive, and it cuts against the feature as charged. Object lifetime is precisely the invariant class an at-scale-fallible writer cannot be trusted to keep unchecked, and N002 states the corpus-wide pattern: optimizer facts are contracts with verifier consequences, not mere annotations. Checked lifetime contracts convert use-after-free, double-free, and leak-past-contract into compile-time machine-readable rejections (F006 is the shipped existence proof); GC and invisible implicit drop mask writer lifetime errors (unintended retention, cycles, hot-loop allocation) into runtime profiling mysteries — no compile-time channel, and any noalias/lifetime metadata emitted over a collector violates memory-object-model.md's emission rule (no lifetime.start/end or noalias without a matching source contract; a collector provides none). However, the defense landed a real verification point the ruling must absorb: the checking power lives in the ownership machinery, not in the writer-written free per se. A checkable free is by construction recomputable by the checker; an uncheckable free is a banned trust point (F003: alias facts are UB-if-false; C004 negative scope), and the arena-plus-index workaround reintroduces use-after-free as well-typed slot-recycling bugs invisible to any checker. So 'every free visible and checkable' is satisfied at the contract-plus-IR level, and whether the source ALSO carries writer-written frees (prosecution's double-entry bookkeeping, which catches wrong lifetime INTENT — e.g., unintended retention surfacing as a compile error at the writer's stated drop point — versus pure drift surface) is a genuine open question the corpus cannot decide.
verdicts.aiWriterConsiderations: All AI-writer claims on both sides are EMPIRICAL-UNTESTED — the corpus contains zero AI-codegen evidence — but the structural ledger is: (1) Token/context cost favors the feature: pervasive region/ownership annotations and viral lifetime parameters through transitive signatures multiply generated and re-read tokens; partially marginal since the round1-aliasing leading candidate already puts ownership in signatures. (2) Diagnostics channel favors the alternative: checked contracts turn lifetime drift and pairing errors into compile-time machine-readable errors inside the iteration loop; GC/RC failure modes surface only at runtime, the worst channel for an AI writer. (3) Consistency drift cuts both ways: repeated alloc/free/region blocks are a drift surface, but the checker converts safety-relevant drift into rejections; equivalent-but-different annotation spellings degrade context caching unless the language enforces canonical forms. (4) Two verification blind spots survive under the alternative and must be closed by tooling: safe-but-pessimal region assignment (everything in one long-lived arena type-checks) and reclamation timeliness (allocating into a too-long-lived region is well-typed), so leak/quality diagnostics vanish from the machine channel unless lint-class feedback is added. (5) Long-range alloc/free pairing obligations and frontier restructurings are compile-iteration cost multipliers with unmeasured rates. None of these ledger entries is carded as decisive; the spelling-level questions are remanded to experiment below.
whatMustBeTrue: The round1-aliasing leading candidate (checked ownership/exclusive-mutation in the type system, currently design_candidate_later, NOT decided) lands substantially as described; both parties conceded their cases derive drop/lifetime facts from it, so if round 2 displaces ownership-like discharge, this verdict must be re-litigated.

memory-object-model.md's prerequisite questions (object identity, provenance, interior-pointer stability across moves, uninitialized bytes, unsafe/callback/signal/finalizer/FFI invalidation) are answered before any lifetime.start/end or noalias emission — per its own emission rule these block BOTH the feature and the alternative today.

The region/arena half of the alternative acquires exemplar evidence cards (Cyclone, MLKit region inference including its leak pathologies, Koka, DPJ) — the ownership half is carded (F001/F006/C004) but the region/effect verifier family currently has ZERO exemplar cards (round1-aliasing P3 assessment), so mandating it today would violate the standing rule exactly as keeping GC would.

The statically-unprovable-lifetime frontier (graphs, shared caches, detached tasks) measures SMALL in performance-critical generated code — round1-aliasing names frontier size the decisive unmeasured variable; if it measures large, the residue channel question (explicit restricted RC type under the dispatch-generics pattern vs arena restructuring vs localized unsafe) reopens as a first-class debate with new cards.

The language ships the amended-alternative requirements in the rationale: canonical annotation forms with compiler-enforced normalization (consistency-checking of repeated code), compiler-derived drop points surfaced as explicit IR ops and machine-readable per-function lifetime reports (F009 route, no invisible reclamation), lint-class timeliness/region-quality diagnostics, and a localized greppable escape-hatch policy whose density is measured.

AI-writer experiments (drift rates on regenerated annotated signatures, alloc/free pairing error rates, compile-diagnostic vs runtime-profiling loop efficacy) do not overturn the structural cost ledger — every behavioral claim in this ruling is EMPIRICAL-UNTESTED.

No shared-mutable RC/interior-mutability type is admitted, even as a restricted channel, before the interior-mutability-vs-shared-reference-noalias tension (misleading-comparisons #2, flagged uncarded by round1-aliasing) is carded and resolved, and before the uncarded RC mechanism costs (barrier/refcount traffic, cycle leaks, C003 possibly-shared pricing) get cards.
verdicts.rationale: RULING: Automatic memory management is cut from the core, and the explicit checked-lifetime alternative becomes a language requirement — in an amended form, with two sub-questions remanded for evidence. (1) What is decided: tracing GC as the ambient memory model, pervasive/default RC-ARC, and invisible implicit drop are OUT. The evidence asymmetry is decisive under the standing rule (caveats.md: proposals must cite exact cards): not one card in F/N/A/D/C/J attests that automatic MM enables optimization, while the alternative's ownership half is the corpus's best-attested machinery (F001, F002, F006, C004, A008, N002). The only cards touching managed-runtime memory attest conditional, implementation-and-inlining-dependent recovery that Oracle explicitly does not guarantee (F007, J004) with warmup/memory costs (J005) — and a charter of extreme performance with a fallible writer demands guarantees, not conditions (the prosecutor used misleading-comparisons #3's exact preferred wording; the defender conceded the point outright). F009 seals it: even the flagship ARC language had to de-automate MM inside its compiler to optimize it. The defense's own stance abandoned pervasive GC, so on the headline feature the parties converge and I so rule. (2) Why replace_with_alternative rather than cut_from_core: the alternative as literally named — 'every allocation and free writer-written' — is NOT fully carried by the evidence. The defense's dichotomy is sound: a checkable writer-written free is recomputable by the very ownership checker the language must build anyway (F001/F006 — pure redundancy whose value or drift-cost is unmeasured), and an uncheckable free is a banned trust point (F003 UB-if-false; C004 negative scope), whose practical workaround (arena-plus-index) resurrects use-after-free as well-typed logical bugs. Moreover the region/arena verifier family has zero exemplar cards (round1-aliasing evidence gap), so the alternative cannot simply be declared load-bearing as-is. The requirement is therefore amended: (a) every allocation carries a writer-stated, compiler-checked storage/lifetime contract (ownership/region type) — the N002 contract pattern; (b) every deallocation is visible and checkable at the contract and IR level — compiler-derived drop points surfaced as explicit IR operations (F009) and as machine-readable per-function lifetime reports, never invisible runtime effects (this also defuses the hidden-effectful-drop conflict with the unsettled violation-semantics/effects debates); (c) compiler-enforced canonical spelling of lifetime annotations plus checker-verified consistency between writer-stated contracts and derived drops, so near-duplicate code cannot drift into equivalent-but-different forms — the consistency-checking obligation this verdict imposes; (d) lint-class machine-readable diagnostics for region-assignment quality and reclamation timeliness, closing the two well-typed-but-wrong holes (one-big-arena pessimization, too-long-lived-region leaks) that neither advocate could card away. (3) What is remanded, not decided: whether source code additionally carries writer-written free/region-end statements (prosecution's double-entry bookkeeping — a writer-intent statement whose mismatch with the checker's derivation is itself a diagnostic — versus defense's pure-token-drift-surface) is empirically undecidable today; F009 evidences only IR-level explicitness and is N=1 with OSSA caveats. And whether the unprovable-lifetime residue gets an explicit restricted RC type (defense's analogy to the dispatch-generics crowned pattern — a real architectural precedent in round1-index — but priced by C003 and punctured by the uncarded interior-mutability tension) or is handled by arenas/localized-unsafe depends on the frontier size round1-aliasing names as the decisive unmeasured variable. Both remands carry named experiments in followUps; the RC channel is re-admissible only with new cards, per the prosecution's own re-admission clause. (4) Judicial notes on argument quality: the prosecutor's J002 extension from speculation-guard machinery to object lifetime is analogical, not carded, and was weighed as pattern-support only; the prosecutor was however scrupulous in refusing to lean on uncarded GC mechanism costs. The defender's honest concession on GC and its verification-architecture dichotomy were the strongest defense material; its 'timeliness becomes unverifiable under regions' point survives and is converted into requirement (d). This is not needs_evidence because the GC/ambient-RC cut and the checked-contract requirement are decidable now on evidence asymmetry; it is not keep_essential because nothing carded makes automatic MM necessary for either optimization or verification; it is not bare cut_from_core because the named alternative needs the amendments and evidence conditions above before it can carry the load it is being handed.
followUps: Run the decisive spelling experiment (AI-codegen, first of its kind for this corpus): generate the same workload suite under (a) writer-written free/region-end statements plus checker and (b) ownership-types-only with compiler-derived, machine-readably-surfaced drops; measure token volume, drift rate across near-duplicate regenerations, compile-iterations-to-green, and detection rate of injected lifetime-intent bugs (unintended retention, premature free). This resolves the remanded writer-written-free question.

Measure the frontier (adopts round1-aliasing follow-up): survey unsafe/Arc/arena-index density in performance-critical Rust code and SPARK ownership discharge rates to size the statically-unprovable-lifetime residue — the variable that decides the RC-fallback question.

Create adversarially-verified cards for the region/effect verifier family (Cyclone, MLKit region inference INCLUDING leak pathologies, Koka, DPJ): the alternative's region half is currently the uncarded mechanism family and this verdict is conditional on it.

Card the deliberately-unused GC/RC mechanism costs before any RC re-admission debate: write/read barriers, safepoint effects on optimization, retain/release cache-line traffic, RC cycle leaks, moving-collector interior-pointer effects — currently background knowledge on both sides' EMPIRICAL-UNTESTED lists.
Card the interior-mutability vs shared-reference-noalias tension (misleading-comparisons #2; round1-aliasing follow-up) — it gates any future shared-mutable fallback type.

Answer memory-object-model.md's prerequisite questions (identity, provenance, interior-pointer stability across moves, FFI/callback/finalizer invalidation) as a blocking work item; its emission rule blocks sound lifetime-fact emission for every design on the table.

Benchmark drop-placement freedom: compiler-sunk/batched/elided drops versus fixed writer-placed frees on realistic workloads, converting F009's in-kind ARC-optimization classes into in-magnitude evidence.

Specify the machine-readable diagnostics schema this verdict requires: lifetime contract violations (error class) plus region-quality and timeliness lints (warning class with locations), and validate that an AI writer can act on them in-loop (EMPIRICAL-UNTESTED).
Re-run this trial if the round2 aliasing debate displaces checked ownership as the discharge mechanism — both parties stipulated this dependency and the court agrees it is load-bearing.

minimalCoreSketch: SURFACE: exactly one canonical form — one spelling per semantic construct, one legal byte-level formatting, grammar isomorphic to the checked core tree; non-canonical input is a hard error, never auto-formatted; the stored artifact is fully elaborated (every type/mode/effect/contract explicit) and is the only stored spelling [syntax, type-inference].

COMPILATION MODEL: closed-world, whole-program, no stable internal ABI, no interposition, no separate semantic compilation; incrementality is implementation-level via content-addressed exact semantic fingerprints; exactly one explicit FFI wall with declared fact-attenuation (currently UNDESIGNED — a named soundness precondition, not a detail) [modules; D004/D007/D008].

TYPES AND FACTS: concrete static types everywhere at boundaries — every function signature, module-interface-equivalent, and instantiation carries explicit ownership/aliasing capability, effect row, numeric mode, and ABI-visible layout; zero cross-boundary inference; whether INTERIOR let-bindings are annotated or produced by deterministic, defaulting-free, ambiguity-rejecting local synthesis is the one open regime question (needs_evidence) [type-inference; F001/F003/N002/C004].

GENERICS: monomorphization-only parametric generics, compiler-side expansion always, explicit instantiation arguments (no inference/bound-solving in the trust path), templates type-checked once against declared bounds before instantiation, no polymorphic recursion or higher-rank parameters, no IR-level generic ABI or witness tables; per-type divergence only via explicit individually-checked specializations with coherence rules [generics; D001/D005/F009 axis held open].

NUMERICS: a small vocabulary of named, truthfully-lowered numeric modes, each arithmetic node naming exactly one mode; zero implicit value-changing conversions — every representation change is an explicit, named, mode-carrying operation [type-inference floor; N001/N002/D010].

DISPATCH: sum types with compiler-checked exhaustive match (wildcard arms banned in checked contexts) as the only dispatch mechanism in core; typed operation tables (named fields, per-row signature checks, construction-checked payload/table coupling, one canonical table per variant-set×operation) as the blessed data-driven form; NO dyn/vtables/trait objects in core — open-set dispatch is remanded to the FFI periphery [dynamic-dispatch; D001/D002/D009].

FUNCTION VALUES: explicit env structs passed as type parameters implementing a call interface, monomorphized to guaranteed direct calls; env-field types (owned/&/&mut) ARE the declared capture modes; no capture inference, no anonymous escaping environments; escaping/heterogeneous sets only via closed tag-enums (record-of-closures is the residual idiom, cost unmeasured) [closures; D009].

MEMORY: every allocation carries a writer-stated, compiler-checked storage/lifetime contract (ownership, with a to-be-carded region/arena layer); deallocation is compiler-derived but surfaced as explicit IR drop ops plus machine-readable per-function lifetime reports — no GC, no ambient RC, no invisible drop; 'cleanup always runs' is explicitly NOT an invariant [memory-automation, error-handling; F001/F006/C004/F009].

ERRORS: Result<T,E> monomorphized to concrete branch-based code with verifier-checked propagation and auto-derived context/cause chains, plus trap-with-report=abort for contract violations, with descriptive stack-attribution metadata (CFI/frame pointers) but no unwinding execution semantics, no catch, no drop-during-unwind [error-handling; F008/C002/A005].

COMPILE-TIME COMPUTATION: a closed, decidable, trivially-terminating constant-expression sublanguage (built-in arithmetic/layout/target-parameter constants only); no user-defined compile-time evaluation, no macros, no staging; facts about constant data are compiler-derived by inspection, never writer-asserted [metaprogramming; F006/N004].

CONTRACT KERNEL (required under every open outcome): named contract groups (signature + law bundles) with per-member conformance checking, and type-level capability predicates (Send/Sync-class, C004) — the interface-shaped machinery both interfaces-trial parties converge on; whether full bounded quantification beyond the kept generics core exists is needs_evidence [interfaces].

VERIFICATION SPINE: the verifier-checked IR (round-1 candidate) rejects any optimizer fact not originating from a stated-and-checked or checker-derived source; law/effect annotations must be checked obligations, not trusted assertions — there is no third state between checked-redundant and unsound-assumed [ir-strategy coupling; F003/N006].

PENDING HOLES the core sketch cannot yet close: interior-annotation regime (type-inference experiment), bounded-quantification form (interfaces experiment + mono/shared measurement), FFI fact-attenuation design, region/arena exemplar evidence, and the charter question of predictable-cost-model vs guaranteed-optimization-floor.
cutList: Implicit value-changing conversions/coercions of any kind, including compiler-inserted numeric widening (decided floor, both parties agreed) [type-inference; N001/N002/D010].
Whole-program / cross-boundary type inference and any inference of intent-bearing facts (ownership, effects, modes, layout) across signatures [type-inference; D009 silent-degradation].

Dynamic dispatch in core: dyn constructs, compiler-synthesized vtables, fat pointers, unsizing coercions, dyn-compatibility rule subsystem (D003), open implementer sets [dynamic-dispatch; D002/D007/D008].

Closures as a language feature: capture inference, capture lists, anonymous closure types, closure conversion in the trusted pipeline, escaping environments; Function-typed fields with hidden call targets made inexpressible [closures; D009, F004 negative scope].

All metaprogramming: syntactic/token/AST macros, user-visible CTFE/comptime, code-producing stages, derive/annotation processors as core features [metaprogramming; F006 restriction pattern, ir-strategy soundness rule].

Human-oriented syntax: infix/precedence, sugar, alternate spellings, elision of contract-bearing facts, resugaring diagnostics, pretty-printer write paths (a bijective infix codec is admissible only later, behind the gating A/B experiment) [syntax].

Exceptions and unwinding: throw/catch, zero-cost EH tables as execution semantics, landingpad/funclet lowering, drop-during-unwind, the 'cleanup always runs' invariant; foreign unwinds abort at the FFI boundary (provisional, evidence-free) [error-handling; F008, refuted rows 1-2].

Module system as semantics: compilation units with stable internal ABI, symbol interposition, module interface files, separately-compiled-and-optimized units (codegen units survive only as build artifacts) [modules; D004/D007/D008].
Automatic memory management: tracing GC, pervasive/default RC-ARC, invisible implicit drop, finalizers [memory-automation; F007/J004 conditional-recovery, F009].

From the kept generics core: instantiation inference, bound solving, polymorphic recursion, higher-rank parameters, IR-level generic ABI/witness tables/shared bodies (deferred behind F003-discharge check and measurement, not cut forever) [generics].
Wildcard/default arms in checked dispatch contexts; index-addressed/positional operation tables; void*/untyped erasure in any sanctioned core form [dynamic-dispatch].
Unrestricted runtime reflection/metadata (per-construct capability declaration required instead) [modules; D005 negative scope].
Also REJECTED though it was an 'alternative': the per-binding layout/mode mandate — interior representation stays optimizer-owned [type-inference; F002/F007/J004/F009].
replacements: UNIFIED CONSISTENCY-CHECKING LAYER (specified once; six verdicts depend on it — syntax, metaprogramming, dynamic-dispatch, closures, type-inference, interfaces, memory-automation). Substrate: the byte-canonical fully-elaborated artifact makes identity syntactic, so the compiler content-addresses every subtree. Four escalating mechanisms over that substrate: (1) IDENTITY BY CONSTRUCTION — anything parametric over types is a generic template, expanded only in-compiler; copies never exist in source, so no check is needed (generics verdict: generation-by-construction dominates check-after-generation). (2) PROVENANCE-CHECKED GENERATION — any other intended-identical or pattern-instantiated region carries machine-readable provenance (generator identity, canonical inputs, content hash); the build re-runs the deterministic EXTERNAL generator and diffs against the source of record; divergence fails the build (metaprogramming). (3) ONE-DEFINITION RULES — one canonical operation table per (variant-set, operation) with ad-hoc switch sites lowered to it or flagged (dynamic-dispatch); dedup detection of structurally identical env-struct/function pairs across modules (closures). (4) ELABORATION-DIFFING — the compiler's canonical elaborated records of near-duplicate fragments are diffed to catch silent type/mode divergence from one-token edits (type-inference). Diagnostics from all four aggregate N copy-local errors into ONE pattern-level repair site via provenance.

Replacing dyn dispatch: sum types + exhaustive match with banned wildcards, plus typed operation tables with named fields, per-row signature checking, construction-checked payload/table coupling (payload X with table Y is a type error), payloads inside the ownership/F003 discipline; on variant-set change the compiler emits a machine-readable site-enumerated edit list (file, site, missing arm/row) as a mechanical repair plan.

Replacing closures: the env-struct + monomorphized call-interface encoding as a GUARANTEED language capability (never fn-pointer+env indirection), plus mandated core ERRORS reconstructing capture-list exactness — unused env field, used-but-uninitialized field, dead dispatch variant, non-exhaustive tag dispatch, signature mismatch — each diagnostic naming all three artifacts (struct, function, construction site) for single-hop repair; snapshot-vs-live is explicit and coercion-free via env-field types.

Replacing metaprogramming: the closed constant sublanguage (target parameters included, so A007-style hardware baking works) + deterministic external generators under provenance checking (mechanism 2 above) + compiler-derived facts about constant data; if arrays-loops adopts a schedule layer it is declarative in-language structure with schedule SEARCH in the AI/tooling loop.

Replacing exceptions: verifier-checked Result propagation riding D001 monomorphization; auto-derived propagation context/cause chains (zero hand-written tokens per site — this neutralizes the strongest pro-unwinding argument); a language-enforced Result-vs-trap classification rule; anti-sentinel lints; trap-with-report=abort with CFI-descriptive (non-executing) stack metadata; declared process-isolation doctrine so catch/recover cannot bolt on.

Replacing module interfaces: function-level contract-bearing signatures (ownership, effects, aliasing, modes) re-verified against bodies on EVERY build as the redundant second statement of intent against coherently-hallucinated caller/callee pairs; compiler-GENERATED token-compact interface views on demand (zero semantic weight, never stored); content-addressed function-level memoized checking and dev-mode codegen for iteration latency; explicit fact-boundary declaration constructs (FFI extern regions, unsafe regions, reflection capability grants) as core surface since modules no longer house them.

Replacing automatic memory management: writer-stated compiler-checked lifetime/region contracts on every allocation; compiler-derived drop points surfaced as explicit IR ops AND machine-readable per-function lifetime reports (F009 route — visible, never invisible); compiler-enforced canonical annotation spellings; lint-class region-quality and reclamation-timeliness diagnostics closing the two well-typed-but-wrong holes (one-big-arena pessimization, too-long-lived-region leaks).

Replacing implicit conversions: explicit named conversion operations at every representation change; writer-stated inferable facts are legal and cross-checked against inference with mismatch as a hard error (redundancy as hallucination checksum).

Replacing the interfaces bundle pending the pivot experiment: the contract-group kernel (named signature+law bundles, per-member conformance checking, provenance metadata) + C004-class capability predicates + the explicit closed-world dispatch construct — the machinery BOTH trial parties conceded is needed under any outcome, currently undesigned.
additionsForAIWriter: Machine-readable diagnostics as a universal contract: node-path references into the canonical artifact; cross-file provenance chains for nonlocal closed-world errors (ownership violations surfacing far from cause); template-level aggregation so one defect yields one repair site, not N per-copy errors; deterministic local parse-error recovery with no heuristic cascades.

Compiler-emitted canonical fully-elaborated form as the mandatory RE-READ artifact: every inferred interior type/mode/effect re-elaborated into it immediately; any AI workflow reading raw source without the elaborator is out of contract (this is a hard tooling requirement, not a convenience — the type-inference verdict's elision option is void without it).

Checkable redundancy channels, since same-pass writer output is error-correlated with itself: optional writer-stated inferable facts cross-checked against inference (mismatch = hard error); function-level contracts as an independent second statement of intent; the interfaces experiment decides whether interior annotations join this set.

Site-enumerated mechanical edit lists on every closed-set change (variant added, contract signature changed): file/site/missing-arm tuples an unattended writer can execute as a to-do list — the diagnostic form that makes O(K) propagation tractable for a fallible writer.

Content-addressed caching of parse/typecheck/verification results on canonical bytes, converting the canonical-form decision into iteration-loop latency wins (compile time is an admissible AI cost channel, D001/D004).

Contract-edit gating: editing a declared contract is a privileged, gated toolchain operation, so a writer cannot launder a hallucinated body through the checker by rewriting the declaration to match it (applies identically to signatures, law bundles, and lifetime contracts).

Multi-process test/fuzz harness engineered around trap=abort (one diagnostic per process death; loss of warm in-process state) — the loop-economics cost the error-handling verdict knowingly accepted; wall-clock must be measured and acceptable or the checked-tier question reopens at the toolchain (never source) level.

Machine-readable trap reports with stack attribution (the only carded post-violation observability story, C002-adjacent) powered by descriptive CFI metadata, doubling as the offline-profile channel for static-vs-profile.

Lint-class machine-actionable feedback for well-typed-but-wrong states invisible to the type system: region-assignment quality, reclamation timeliness, in-band sentinel encoding, structural env-struct/table duplication reports.

Toolchain-boundary policing: no pretty-printer, macro layer, or out-of-core dialect may introduce a second stored spelling; any future write-path codec must be bijective, version-pinned, parse-print-parse-fixpoint-checked, and echo only canonical form; violation semantics for provenance-check failures live in the build system.

Generator/provenance infrastructure (mechanism 2 of the consistency layer) as a first-class toolchain component: deterministic external generators as source-of-record producers, provenance records ergonomic enough for an AI writer to emit reliably (itself EMPIRICAL-UNTESTED).
round1VerdictsAffected: dispatch-generics (design_candidate_later) — AMENDED IN BOTH HALVES: the generics verdict confirms and narrows the 'guaranteed static specialization as only implicit path' half (mono-only, explicit instantiation, no inference), keeping the D005/F009 sharing axis open behind the ordered measurement program; but the 'explicit, restricted dynamic dispatch construct' half is now CUT from core and remanded to the FFI periphery by the dynamic-dispatch verdict — the round-1 candidate's second pillar no longer exists in core and the closures verdict still routes escaping function values through it (see tensions). The D003 composition hole and function-value dispatch gap (line 52/68 follow-ups) are now answered by the env-struct/tag-enum encoding, which must be entered as an amendment.

aliasing-model (design_candidate_later) — LOAD MASSIVELY INCREASED: memory-automation, closures, modules, and error-handling all condition on checked ownership landing substantially as described; both memory-trial parties stipulated re-litigation if round 2 displaces it. New blocking obligations attached: a carded callback/env-struct borrow → noalias/alias.scope story (misleading-comparisons #2), region/effect verifier exemplar cards (currently ZERO — Cyclone/MLKit/Koka/DPJ), and memory-object-model.md prerequisite questions before any lifetime-fact emission.

violation-semantics (research_needed) — CONSTRAINED: round 2 must take trap=abort as release-mode failure semantics, specify checked-tier diagnostics UNDER abort (in-process containment is off the table at source level, revisitable only as toolchain-internal mechanism if the multi-process loop measurement fails), specify trap meaning under racing threads, and design graduated obligations without assuming unwinding or 'cleanup always runs'.

concurrency-model (research_needed) — C004 capability predicates promoted to a required core kernel component by the interfaces and memory verdicts, with the record CORRECTED: C004 is a provisional direct extraction, not workflow-confirmed 3-0 as argued in trial. The modules closed-world verdict must be reopened if concurrency resolves toward runtime-loaded components/foreign threads.

ir-strategy (research_needed) — STRENGTHENED AND TASKED: the 'every boundary is a fact-loss surface' finding now underwrites the modules cut; the verifier acquires the fact-provenance rule (reject facts not stated-and-checked or checker-derived); drops become explicit IR ops it must carry; the all-TBD closure-capture capability-map row is replaced by rows for the mandated encoding; the Alive2-style validation surface SHRINKS (no desugaring rewrites, no closure conversion, no unwind CFG synthesis to prove).

numeric-semantics (no_decision) — PARTIALLY DISCHARGED: the zero-implicit-conversion floor and one-mode-per-arithmetic-node requirement are now decided language law, confirming the named-truthful-modes surface architecture; the default-mode policy question remains open; the 'uncarded fourth channel' (compiler-inferred facts from types/guards) backlog item is elevated because two verdicts price it.

static-vs-profile (research_needed) — the stack-attribution carve-out (descriptive CFI without F008-class codegen constraints) is now the load-bearing, uncarded assumption feeding its offline-profile channel; the metadata-vs-execution distinction must be validated at implementation time.

arrays-loops (prototype_needed) — CONSTRAINED: zero-staging binds the schedule layer (declarative in-language structure; search in tooling); body regions must be specified as second-class, non-escaping, capture-free-or-explicitly-parameterized so capture semantics cannot re-enter through loop bodies; the prototype brief must state this explicitly.

syntax (previously deferred by corpus fiat — 'no syntax decisions yet') — the deferral is SUPERSEDED: canonical-form-only is decided, with the infix write-codec question parked behind its own gated experiment; source-to-ir-lowering-sketches.md and the A001 negative-scope note should be annotated accordingly.
empiricalResearchNeeded: THE FLAGSHIP DRIFT EXPERIMENT (arbitrates generics, interfaces, metaprogramming at once — all EMPIRICAL-UNTESTED, corpus has zero AI-codegen evidence): same algorithm family generated as (a) generic template + explicit instantiations, (b) N copies under a substitution-equality/contract-group checker, (c) N unchecked copies, across repeated edit/regeneration cycles; measure semantic drift rate, drift ESCAPING the checker, law-annotation desynchronization, tokens generated+re-read, repair iterations, and whether writers regenerate ALL copies after a template edit.

Redundancy-independence (decides type-inference): mandatory interior annotations vs elided interiors + elaboration records; measure (a) rate interior annotations catch real semantic errors the elided regime compiles wrong, (b) correlated-wrongness rate (annotation and code both wrong, typechecks), (c) trivial-mismatch friction and iterations-to-green; plus token economics on read-modify-write tasks including deep generic pipelines (the O(k^2) claim) and re-read error rates raw-source vs elaborated views.

Defunctionalization drift (decides the closures desugaring-layer reopener): manual env-structs with mandated exactness diagnostics vs explicit-capture-list closures desugaring to identical IR; measure silent-semantic-divergence rate (snapshot-vs-live field-type choice, population-site wrong-referent wiring), fraction caught at compile time, repair-loop length per diagnostic class; pre-commit the threshold that adds the desugaring layer.

Dispatch-edit economics (dynamic-dispatch reopener): edit-list-guided O(K) switch-site updates after variant addition vs O(1) dyn impl edits — drift and repair success rates; arm-body divergence across K duplicate sites with/without the one-definition table rule; plus a PREVALENCE CENSUS of closed vs open dispatch sites in performance-critical generated code (the verdict's load-bearing assumption).

Syntax A/B (gates the infix codec): identical kernel specs rendered to canonical form vs infix using REAL model tokenizers on whole programs (not the 1.35–1.48x regex-proxy fragments); measure generation tokens, first-parse success, silent operand-order/associativity-swap rate vs precedence-misbinding rate via differential testing, repair iterations, and the training-distribution penalty decay with in-context examples.

Error-handling triple: (a) drift in hand-written vs auto-derived Result context (type-correct context loss), (b) violation rate of implicit exception-safety invariants under near-duplicate edits, (c) Result-vs-trap taxonomy consistency across a large generated codebase; PLUS the three-way benchmark Result-return vs landingpad vs trap=abort (hot-path speed, code size, compile time, binary size) — the single most decision-capable missing artifact — and multi-process respawn vs in-process containment wall-clock per detected defect.

Closed-world compile-loop pricing (modules' biggest unpriced cost): prototype deterministic whole-program compiler with content-addressed function-level memoized checking + dev-mode codegen; measure iteration latency and peak memory at synthetic AI-scale program sizes (AI code plausibly larger/more repetitive); pre-commit reopen thresholds; plus contract-catch rate on coherently-hallucinated caller/callee pairs, interface-view token economics, nonlocal-diagnostic machine-repairability, and whether contract-edit gating prevents laundering.

Memory spelling + frontier: (a) writer-written free/region-end statements + checker vs ownership-only with surfaced drops — tokens, drift, iterations-to-green, detection of injected lifetime-intent bugs; (b) frontier sizing via unsafe/Arc/arena-index density in performance-critical Rust and SPARK ownership discharge rates (decides the RC-fallback question); (c) drop-placement freedom benchmarks (sunk/batched/elided vs fixed placement).

Construction-level checks that gate multiple verdicts: can shared/erased/indirect callee bodies soundly discharge F003 noalias/alias.scope against LLVM semantics, at what precision loss (prices generic sharing, tables, closures, and periphery dyn IDENTICALLY); can CFI/stack-attribution metadata be emitted truly free of F008-class codegen constraints; can law annotations carry checkable proof obligations that survive lowering and are consumed by passes end-to-end.

Ordered measurement programs with pre-committed thresholds: monomorphization vs shared-body vs dictionary-passing (runtime, code size, i-cache, compile time, incl. rustc share-generics dedup data); record-of-closures (N env+code ptrs) vs fat-pointer trait object (1+1); exhaustive switch vs indirect table vs vtable at varying arity (corpus has ZERO quantitative dispatch cards).

Missing dossiers/cards blocking design: ffi_abi_runtime primary sources (priority-high; the single FFI wall now carries ALL boundary load); LLVM whole-program devirtualization dossier; Swift generics-ABI dossier (F009 fourth model — couples to the modules cut); Rust noalias enable/disable/miscompile incident history; region/effect verifier family exemplars (Cyclone, MLKit incl. leak pathologies, Koka, DPJ); GC/RC mechanism-cost cards; interior-mutability vs shared-reference-noalias tension card.

Adversarial verification of every load-bearing provisional card, per the caveats.md standing rule: D001 (flagged priority — generics verdict falls with it), D002, D003, D005, D007, D009, D010, C004, J004, A001, A002, A006; plus manual recheck of the two refuted LLVM EH claims; plus surfacing the N/A/C/J series in a re-weighed dispatch hearing (round 1 ran on the D/F subset).

Diagnostics repair-loop asymmetry: AI fix success and latency on literal-source diagnostics vs expansion-backtrace diagnostics into generated code; and whether AI writers act effectively on lint-class (non-error) region/timeliness feedback in-loop.
openTensions: Generics vs interfaces on the SAME pivot: the generics verdict (keep_essential) puts a single generic body with declared, once-checked BOUNDS in the core; the interfaces verdict rules that exact question — bounded quantification vs concretized contract groups — needs_evidence and 'empirically unarbitrable today'. As written, generics has already decided interfaces' contested residue. Either the interfaces experiment is demoted to deciding only the CONTRACT-GROUP surface around the kept generics, or the two rulings must be formally reconciled — and generics' 'declared bounds' presuppose the contract-group kernel that interfaces marks undesigned. Who owns bounds is unassigned.

Closures vs dynamic-dispatch on the escape valve: the closures verdict REQUIRES escaping/heterogeneous function values to route through 'the explicit, restricted D003-style dynamic construct' — a construct the dynamic-dispatch verdict simultaneously cut from core and remanded to the undesigned periphery. In core, only closed tag-enums/record-of-closures remain, and the closures verdict itself flags record-of-closures as a degenerate existential — 'the crack through which restricted dyn could legitimately re-enter'. Needs a joint ruling, not two independent ones.

Modules' closed-world/no-ABI cut vs the generics sharing axis 'held open': D005 bounded sharing and the F009 Swift-style fourth model imply witness tables and stable ABI machinery whose entire rationale contradicts the modules verdict. Both verdicts record the coupling but point in opposite directions if the measurement program favors sharing. One of 'sharing stays open' and 'no internal ABI ever' will have to yield.

The metaprogramming ruling arguably contradicts the generics COLLAPSE argument: generics ruled that a checker able to compute template[T] should BE the expander (generation-by-construction dominates check-after-generation), yet metaprogramming ruled the opposite architecture — external generation + provenance diff (check-after-generation) — for every pattern not parametric over types. The boundary 'types → in-language template; values/structure → external generator' is asserted, not derived; value-parametric pattern families sit ambiguously, and pressure there is exactly the workload-census reopening condition metaprogramming names.

Trap=abort vs the AI iteration loop: error-handling accepts one-diagnostic-per-process-death and unexercisable failure-path cleanup as toolchain problems, while violation-semantics (research_needed) still owes a checked tier. If the multi-process harness measurement fails, the pressure lands on a dual-mode (checked-tier unwinding) design the error-handling verdict names as its own strongest standing objection — a genuine unresolved fork.

Fully-elaborated stored artifact (syntax) vs interior elision (type-inference, open): if elision wins its experiment, the writer EMITS non-elaborated text but the language STORES only the elaborated canonical form — creating exactly the second-spelling / write-path-codec situation the syntax verdict polices. The elaborator then IS a codec and must meet the bijectivity/fixpoint rules; neither verdict says which artifact is the source of record during a repair loop.

Compiler freedom vs predictability, unresolved charter question: memory-automation grants the compiler drop sink/batch/elide freedom, dispatch bans silent devirtualization-dependence, and generics flags 'may the compiler silently de-duplicate/devirtualize what the writer wrote explicitly' as the open performance-transparency question (predictable cost model vs guaranteed-optimization floor). Three verdicts assume different answers; it gates all of them and is assigned to no one.

Everything remanded to the periphery, and the periphery doesn't exist: open-set dispatch, foreign unwinds, dynamic loading, reflection capabilities, and all fact attenuation now live at a single FFI wall whose design has zero primary-source cards (ffi_abi_runtime: missing_primary_source, priority-high). The periphery is accreting into a second, evidence-free language; multiple verdicts list its design as a soundness PRECONDITION while none blocks on it procedurally.

Consistency-layer proliferation vs coherence: six verdicts each mandated their own drift mechanism (provenance diff, one-definition tables, env-struct dedup, elaboration diffing, contract groups, canonical spellings). This synthesis unifies them over the canonical artifact, but no verdict authorizes that unification — if they ship as six separate subsystems, the toolchain reproduces the very near-duplicate-machinery drift the charter forbids in source.

Load concentration on provisional evidence: checked ownership (aliasing round 2 not yet run) and card D001 are single points of failure for memory-automation, closures, modules, error-handling, and generics simultaneously; C004 — now known to be provisional, not confirmed — is load-bearing for the interfaces kernel and concurrency coupling. The verdict lattice is coherent but rests on a handful of unverified cards the standing rule says must survive adversarial verification before any of this hardens into spec.
